---
title: "Gaussian Process Emulator for Planetary System Distributions via MFPCA"
author: "Yiming Chen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    fig_crop: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.align = "center", fig.width = 8, fig.height = 5)
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ks)        
library(MFPCA)
library(funData)
library(fda)
library(zoo)
library(MASS)
raw_data <- read.table("C:/Users/SOS/Desktop/Planet emulator/data/mockobserved.txt", 
                       skip = 7, header = FALSE, sep = "", fill = TRUE)
colnames(raw_data) <- c("sigma_z", "period_ratio", "num_transiting", 
                        "hill_spacing", "duration_ratio")

safe_log <- function(x) log(pmax(x, 1e-8))

clean_data <- raw_data %>%
  mutate(
    log_period   = safe_log(period_ratio),
    log_duration = safe_log(duration_ratio),
    log_hill     = safe_log(hill_spacing)
  ) %>%
  filter(across(c(log_period, log_duration, log_hill), ~ is.finite(.)))

# Filter sigmas with sufficient observations
sigma_counts  <- table(clean_data$sigma_z)
valid_sigmas1 <- as.numeric(names(sigma_counts[sigma_counts >= 40]))
filtered_data <- clean_data %>% filter(sigma_z %in% valid_sigmas1)

# Additional filtering for unique values
sigma_summary <- filtered_data %>%
  group_by(sigma_z) %>%
  summarise(
    uniq_period = n_distinct(log_period),
    uniq_dur    = n_distinct(log_duration),
    uniq_hill   = n_distinct(log_hill),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
good_sigmas <- sigma_summary %>%
  filter(uniq_period >= 5, uniq_dur >= 5, uniq_hill >= 5) %>%
  pull(sigma_z)
valid_sigmas <- intersect(valid_sigmas1, good_sigmas)

cat("Number of valid sigma values:", length(valid_sigmas), "\n")
```
```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 3. ADAPTIVE KDE & SMOOTHING (TO CREATE FUNCTIONAL DATA)
# ==============================================================================
# Define Grids
x_range <- quantile(filtered_data$log_period, c(0.01, 0.99))
y_range <- quantile(filtered_data$log_duration, c(0.01, 0.99))
z_range <- quantile(filtered_data$log_hill, c(0.01, 0.99))

x_grid <- seq(x_range[1], x_range[2], length.out = 200)
y_grid <- seq(y_range[1], y_range[2], length.out = 200)
z_grid <- seq(z_range[1], z_range[2], length.out = 200)

# Adaptive KDE Function
adaptive_kde_1d <- function(data, grid, abram_exp, clip_low, clip_high) {
  data <- as.numeric(data)
  
  # Pilot bandwidth
  pilot_bw <- tryCatch({
    max(hpi(x = data) * 0.4, 0.01)
  }, error = function(e) {
    max(bw.nrd0(data) * 0.4, 0.01)
  })
  
  pilot_dens <- density(data, bw = pilot_bw, n = 512)
  interp_vals <- approx(pilot_dens$x, pilot_dens$y, xout = data, rule = 2)$y
  interp_vals[!is.finite(interp_vals) | interp_vals <= 0] <- 
    min(interp_vals[interp_vals > 0], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  g <- exp(mean(log(interp_vals)))
  scaling_factors <- (interp_vals / g)^abram_exp
  scaling_factors <- pmin(pmax(scaling_factors, clip_low), clip_high)
  
  result <- numeric(length(grid))
  for (i in seq_along(data)) {
    bw_i <- pilot_bw * scaling_factors[i]
    result <- result + dnorm((grid - data[i]) / bw_i) / bw_i
  }
  result <- result / length(data)
  
  # Ensure non-negative and normalize
  result <- pmax(result, 1e-10)
  delta <- diff(range(grid)) / (length(grid) - 1)
  result / (sum(result) * delta)
}

# Generate Densities
dens_mat_x <- list()
dens_mat_y <- list()
dens_mat_z <- list()
sigma_list <- numeric(0)

cat("Computing KDE for each sigma...\n")
for (s in valid_sigmas) {
  group <- filtered_data %>% filter(sigma_z == s)
  dens_mat_x[[length(dens_mat_x) + 1]] <- adaptive_kde_1d(group$log_period,   x_grid, 0.0, 1.0, 2.0)
  dens_mat_y[[length(dens_mat_y) + 1]] <- adaptive_kde_1d(group$log_duration, y_grid, -0.2, 0.6, 2.0)
  dens_mat_z[[length(dens_mat_z) + 1]] <- adaptive_kde_1d(group$log_hill,     z_grid, -0.1, 1.2, 2.0)
  sigma_list <- c(sigma_list, s)
}
dens_mat_x <- do.call(rbind, dens_mat_x)
dens_mat_y <- do.call(rbind, dens_mat_y)
dens_mat_z <- do.call(rbind, dens_mat_z)

cat("Density matrices created. Dimensions:", nrow(dens_mat_x), "x", ncol(dens_mat_x), "\n")

# ==============================================================================
# DYNAMIC SUPPORT MASKING
# ==============================================================================
# This function forces tails to be flat based on each sigma's actual data range.
# WHY: KDE can produce spurious density in regions with no data (extrapolation noise).
# By masking grid points outside each sigma's true data range, we eliminate this.
# ==============================================================================

apply_dynamic_mask <- function(density_matrix, grid, raw_data_list, sigma_vals, buffer = 0.10) {
  # Make a copy of the matrix to modify
  masked_matrix <- density_matrix
  
  for (i in seq_along(sigma_vals)) {
    s <- sigma_vals[i]
    
    # Get raw data for this sigma (use character key for list lookup)
    raw_vals <- raw_data_list[[as.character(s)]]
    
    if (is.null(raw_vals) || length(raw_vals) == 0) next
    
    # Find the true data bounds for this sigma
    bounds <- range(raw_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
    range_width <- diff(bounds)
    
    # Define "Safe Zone" (Data Range + buffer%)
    lower_cutoff <- bounds[1] - buffer * range_width
    upper_cutoff <- bounds[2] + buffer * range_width
    
    # Identify grid points OUTSIDE this sigma's safe zone
    mask_indices <- which(grid < lower_cutoff | grid > upper_cutoff)
    
    # Force them to a near-zero density value before smoothing.
    masked_matrix[i, mask_indices] <- 1e-12
  }
  
  return(masked_matrix)
}

# Prepare raw data lists (split by sigma)
list_x <- split(filtered_data$log_period, filtered_data$sigma_z)
list_y <- split(filtered_data$log_duration, filtered_data$sigma_z)
list_z <- split(filtered_data$log_hill, filtered_data$sigma_z)

# Apply the mask (AFTER KDE, BEFORE smoothing)
cat("Applying dynamic support masking (10% buffer)...\n")
dens_mat_x_masked <- apply_dynamic_mask(dens_mat_x, x_grid, list_x, valid_sigmas, buffer = 0.10)
dens_mat_y_masked <- apply_dynamic_mask(dens_mat_y, y_grid, list_y, valid_sigmas, buffer = 0.10)
dens_mat_z_masked <- apply_dynamic_mask(dens_mat_z, z_grid, list_z, valid_sigmas, buffer = 0.10)

# ==============================================================================
# DIRECT X/Z GRID REPRESENTATION
# ==============================================================================
# X (Period) and Z (Hill spacing) enter MFPCA directly on their masked KDE
# grids. Geometry variables are NA placeholders because reconstruction decodes
# directly on the density grids.
# ==============================================================================
x_direct_masked <- dens_mat_x_masked
z_direct_masked <- dens_mat_z_masked

peak_loc_x_all <- peak_height_x_all <- peak_width_x_all <-
  peak_left_width_x_all <- peak_right_width_x_all <- peak_skew_x_all <-
  rep(NA_real_, nrow(dens_mat_x))
peak_loc_z_all <- peak_height_z_all <- peak_width_z_all <-
  peak_left_width_z_all <- peak_right_width_z_all <- peak_skew_z_all <-
  rep(NA_real_, nrow(dens_mat_z))

ref_peak_x_loc <- ref_peak_x_width <- ref_peak_x_left_width <-
  ref_peak_x_right_width <- ref_peak_z_loc <- ref_peak_z_width <-
  ref_peak_z_left_width <- ref_peak_z_right_width <- NA_real_

cat("Using masked X/Z KDE grids directly.\n")

# ==============================================================================
# B-Spline Smoothing
# ==============================================================================
# SETTINGS:
# - nbasis: Controls flexibility. Higher = more wiggles possible.
# - lambda: Smoothing penalty. Higher = stiffer splines.
# ==============================================================================
nbasis <- 80        # Higher flexibility to capture sharp multi-modal peaks
lambda <- 1e-5      # Lighter smoothing to preserve peak structure

cat("B-spline settings: nbasis =", nbasis, ", lambda =", lambda, "\n")

x_basis <- create.bspline.basis(range(x_grid), nbasis)
y_basis <- create.bspline.basis(range(y_grid), nbasis)
z_basis <- create.bspline.basis(range(z_grid), nbasis)

# Smooth the MASKED density matrices
x_fd <- smooth.basis(x_grid, t(x_direct_masked), fdPar(x_basis, 2, lambda))$fd
y_fd <- smooth.basis(y_grid, t(dens_mat_y_masked), fdPar(y_basis, 2, lambda))$fd
z_fd <- smooth.basis(z_grid, t(z_direct_masked), fdPar(z_basis, 2, lambda))$fd
```
```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 4. SQUARE-ROOT (HELLINGER) TRANSFORMATION & MFPCA
# ==============================================================================
# Evaluate smoothed densities
x_smooth <- t(eval.fd(x_grid, x_fd))
y_smooth <- t(eval.fd(y_grid, y_fd))
z_smooth <- t(eval.fd(z_grid, z_fd))

# Ensure non-negative (smoothing can create small negatives)
x_smooth <- pmax(x_smooth, 0)
y_smooth <- pmax(y_smooth, 0)
z_smooth <- pmax(z_smooth, 0)

# Normalize each smoothed curve as a density before the Hellinger map.
normalize_density_matrix <- function(dens_matrix, grid) {
  delta <- diff(range(grid)) / (length(grid) - 1)
  t(apply(dens_matrix, 1, function(row) {
    row <- pmax(as.numeric(row), 0)
    mass <- sum(row) * delta
    if (!is.finite(mass) || mass <= 0) {
      row <- rep(1 / diff(range(grid)), length(grid))
      mass <- sum(row) * delta
    }
    row / mass
  }))
}

# Square-root density transform. Variable names retain the old x_clr/y_clr/z_clr
# convention so downstream GP code does not need a full rewrite.
sqrt_density_transform_matrix <- function(dens_matrix, grid) {
  sqrt(normalize_density_matrix(dens_matrix, grid))
}

x_clr <- sqrt_density_transform_matrix(x_smooth, x_grid)
y_clr <- sqrt_density_transform_matrix(y_smooth, y_grid)
z_clr <- sqrt_density_transform_matrix(z_smooth, z_grid)

# Create funData objects in square-root density space
multifd_sqrt <- multiFunData(
  funData(argvals = list(x_grid), X = x_clr),
  funData(argvals = list(y_grid), X = y_clr),
  funData(argvals = list(z_grid), X = z_clr)
)

# Run MFPCA
M_components <- 30  # Ensure we don't exceed available components
uniex <- list(
  list(type = "splines1Dpen", bs = "ps", m = 2, k = 75),
  list(type = "splines1Dpen", bs = "ps", m = 2, k = 50),
  list(type = "splines1Dpen", bs = "ps", m = 2, k = 75)
)

# Calculate weights (inverse variance)
calc_weights <- function(X) { 1 / max(mean(apply(X, 1, var)), 1e-10) }
weights <- c(calc_weights(x_clr), calc_weights(y_clr), calc_weights(z_clr))
weights <- weights / mean(weights)

cat("Running MFPCA with", M_components, "components...\n")
set.seed(42)
mfpca_fit <- MFPCA(multifd_sqrt, M = M_components, uniExpansions = uniex, weights = weights)
```


```{r}
# Extract Scores
scores <- as.data.frame(mfpca_fit$scores)
if (nrow(scores) != length(sigma_list)) {
  stop(sprintf("MFPCA score rows (%d) do not match sigma_list length (%d).",
               nrow(scores), length(sigma_list)))
}
if (ncol(scores) == 0) {
  stop("MFPCA returned zero score columns. Check mfpca_fit$scores.")
}
M_components <- ncol(scores)
ufpca_scores_long <- data.frame(theta = sigma_list, scores)
colnames(ufpca_scores_long)[-1] <- paste0("PC", seq_len(ncol(scores)))

ind_var_pct <- round(100 * mfpca_fit$values / sum(mfpca_fit$values), 2)
cat("MFPCA complete. Variance explained per component (top 5):",
    paste(ind_var_pct[1:min(5, M_components)], collapse = ", "), "%\n")
cat("  Cumulative variance (all", M_components, "components):",
    round(sum(ind_var_pct), 2), "%\n")
```
```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# SIGN ALIGNMENT (GLOBAL, ONE DECISION PER PC)
# ==============================================================================
# In a single MFPCA run the eigenfunction direction is fixed but arbitrary.
# We make ONE global sign choice per PC so that positive scores correspond to
# positive correlation with theta, giving a consistent physical interpretation.
# This replaces the previous per-observation local-flip approach, which was
# mathematically incorrect and was corrupting the score series.
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== SIGN ALIGNMENT (Global per PC) ===\n")

# Sort by theta for alignment and all downstream plotting
sigma_order <- order(ufpca_scores_long$theta)
ufpca_scores_sorted <- ufpca_scores_long[sigma_order, ]

n_pcs <- ncol(scores)
ufpca_scores_corrected <- ufpca_scores_sorted
pc_signs <- rep(1, n_pcs)

cat(sprintf("%-6s %12s %12s %s\n", "PC", "corr(sigma)", "acf(lag1)", "Action"))
cat(paste(rep("-", 48), collapse = ""), "\n")

for (pc in 1:n_pcs) {
  pc_col    <- paste0("PC", pc)
  raw       <- ufpca_scores_sorted[[pc_col]]
  sigma_vec <- ufpca_scores_sorted$theta

  # Global correlation with theta determines orientation convention
  corr_sigma <- cor(raw, sigma_vec)

  if (is.finite(corr_sigma) && corr_sigma < 0) {
    ufpca_scores_corrected[[pc_col]] <- -raw
    pc_signs[pc] <- -1
    action <- "flipped"
  } else {
    action <- "kept"
  }

  aligned <- ufpca_scores_corrected[[pc_col]]
  acf_val <- cor(aligned[-length(aligned)], aligned[-1])

  if (pc <= 10)
    cat(sprintf("PC%-4d %12.3f %12.3f %s\n", pc, corr_sigma, acf_val, action))
}
cat("\n")

# Restore original order after alignment
original_order     <- order(sigma_order)
ufpca_scores_long  <- ufpca_scores_corrected[original_order, ]

# Keep the decoder consistent with the sign-aligned scores used by the GP.
for (var_idx in seq_along(mfpca_fit$functions)) {
  if (nrow(mfpca_fit$functions[[var_idx]]@X) != n_pcs) {
    stop(sprintf("Cannot sign-align MFPCA functions for variable %d: expected %d rows, found %d",
                 var_idx, n_pcs, nrow(mfpca_fit$functions[[var_idx]]@X)))
  }
  mfpca_fit$functions[[var_idx]]@X <- sweep(mfpca_fit$functions[[var_idx]]@X, 1, pc_signs, "*")
}
scores_aligned <- sweep(as.matrix(scores), 2, pc_signs, "*")
colnames(scores_aligned) <- paste0("PC", seq_len(n_pcs))
mfpca_fit$scores <- scores_aligned
scores <- as.data.frame(scores_aligned)

# ==============================================================================
# TREND-RESIDUAL DECOMPOSITION FOR GP
# ==============================================================================
# Each KDE is estimated from ~20-50 observations, introducing substantial noise
# in the MFPCA scores. Option A decomposes each sign-aligned PC score into:
#   raw score_k(theta) = LOESS trend_k(theta) + residual_k(theta).
#
# The GP now models residual_k(theta) = raw score_k(theta) - LOESS trend_k(theta).
# At prediction, the final score mean is:
#   LOESS trend_k(theta*) + GP residual mean_k(theta*).
# Posterior score variance is the GP posterior variance only; no post-hoc
# sigma2_resid,k is added to prediction variances or samples.
# ==============================================================================

LOESS_SPAN_SCORE <- 0.20   # was effectively ~0.98 in the latest run; lower to capture trend without oversmoothing
cat(sprintf("Applying loess smoothing to PC scores (span = %.2f, fixed)...\n", LOESS_SPAN_SCORE))

ufpca_scores_raw_aligned <- ufpca_scores_long   # sign-corrected, original order
ufpca_scores_smoothed    <- ufpca_scores_long
ufpca_scores_resid       <- ufpca_scores_long
theta_all                <- ufpca_scores_long$theta
loess_models             <- vector("list", n_pcs)
loess_span_k             <- rep(NA_real_, n_pcs)

for (pc in 1:n_pcs) {
  pc_col  <- paste0("PC", pc)
  score_k <- as.numeric(ufpca_scores_long[[pc_col]])
  lo <- loess(ufpca_scores_long[[pc_col]] ~ theta_all,
              span = LOESS_SPAN_SCORE,
              control = loess.control(surface = "direct"))
  loess_models[[pc]] <- lo
  loess_span_k[pc] <- LOESS_SPAN_SCORE
  ufpca_scores_smoothed[[pc_col]] <- fitted(lo)
  ufpca_scores_resid[[pc_col]] <- score_k - fitted(lo)
}

predict_loess_trend <- function(lo, theta_vals) {
  pred <- tryCatch(
    predict(lo, newdata = data.frame(theta_all = theta_vals)),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (is.null(pred) || length(pred) != length(theta_vals) ||
      all(!is.finite(as.numeric(pred)))) {
    pred <- predict(lo, newdata = data.frame(x = theta_vals))
  }
  as.numeric(pred)
}

pc_cols_all <- paste0("PC", seq_len(n_pcs))
sigma2_resid_k <- sapply(pc_cols_all, function(c) {
  var(ufpca_scores_resid[[c]], na.rm = TRUE)
})
sigma2_resid_k <- pmax(sigma2_resid_k, 1e-8)

# Honest belief: most of the residual is unpredictable noise. Earlier values
# (0.01x and 0.001x) caused the GP to overfit training residuals and gave
# negative iCRPS skill. Use 0.5x as the floor; the data showed residual ACF
# is low, so the GP should be told the residual is mostly noise.
obs_noise_floor_k <- pmax(0.5 * sigma2_resid_k, 1e-6)

# Autocorrelation report (sorted by theta)
sigma_order2 <- order(ufpca_scores_long$theta)
cat("\n=== Fixed-Span LOESS Trend / Residual Autocorrelation Check (Lag-1, sorted by theta) ===\n")
cat("Threshold: >0.5 [OK], 0.3-0.5 [WARN], <0.3 [BAD]\n")
cat(sprintf("%-6s %10s %10s %10s %10s\n",
            "PC", "Span", "Smoothed", "Residual", "Status"))
cat(paste(rep("-", 54), collapse = ""), "\n")

for (pc in 1:n_pcs) {
  pc_col   <- paste0("PC", pc)
  smooth_s <- as.numeric(ufpca_scores_smoothed[sigma_order2, pc_col])
  resid_s  <- as.numeric(ufpca_scores_resid[sigma_order2, pc_col])

  acf_smooth <- cor(smooth_s[-length(smooth_s)], smooth_s[-1])
  acf_resid  <- cor(resid_s[-length(resid_s)],   resid_s[-1])
  status     <- if (acf_resid > 0.5) "[OK]" else if (acf_resid > 0.3) "[WARN]" else "[BAD]"

  cat(sprintf("PC%-4d %10.3f %10.3f %10.3f %10s\n",
              pc, loess_span_k[pc], acf_smooth, acf_resid, status))
}

cat("\n=== Residual ACF (lag-1) per PC, sorted by theta ===\n")
cat("Interpretation: ACF < 0.3 means residuals are essentially iid noise\n")
cat("                ACF > 0.5 means residuals carry exploitable structure\n")
cat(sprintf("%-6s %10s %10s\n", "PC", "Resid ACF", "Verdict"))
cat(paste(rep("-", 30), collapse = ""), "\n")
n_acf_low <- 0L
for (pc in seq_len(n_pcs)) {
  pc_col <- paste0("PC", pc)
  r <- as.numeric(ufpca_scores_resid[sigma_order2, pc_col])
  acf1 <- cor(r[-length(r)], r[-1])
  verdict <- if (is.na(acf1)) {
    "NA"
  } else if (acf1 > 0.5) {
    "[STRUCTURE]"
  } else if (acf1 > 0.3) {
    "[WEAK]"
  } else {
    "[NOISE]"
  }
  if (!is.na(acf1) && acf1 <= 0.3) n_acf_low <- n_acf_low + 1L
  cat(sprintf("PC%-4d %10.3f %10s\n", pc, acf1, verdict))
}
cat(paste(rep("-", 30), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat(sprintf("PCs with residual ACF <= 0.3: %d / %d\n", n_acf_low, n_pcs))
if (n_acf_low > 0.7 * n_pcs) {
  cat("[WARN] Most residuals are noise-like. The residual GP cannot help.\n")
  cat("       Consider reverting to the Apr29 smoothed-target GP.\n")
}

cat("\nOption A score decomposition:\n")
cat("  GP target: raw MFPCA score - fixed-span LOESS trend\n")
cat("  Prediction: fixed-span LOESS trend + GP residual mean\n")
cat("  Posterior score variance: GP posterior variance only\n")

cat("\nResidual variance and residual-GP nugget:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Residual var (PC1-5): %.4f %.4f %.4f %.4f %.4f\n",
            sigma2_resid_k[1], sigma2_resid_k[2], sigma2_resid_k[3],
            sigma2_resid_k[4], sigma2_resid_k[5]))
cat(sprintf("  Obs noise floor (PC1-5): %.5f %.5f %.5f %.5f %.5f\n",
            obs_noise_floor_k[1], obs_noise_floor_k[2], obs_noise_floor_k[3],
            obs_noise_floor_k[4], obs_noise_floor_k[5]))

# Diagnostics retained for figures. These are not added post-hoc to GP draws.
pc_residual_var_global <- sigma2_resid_k
pc_residual_sd <- sqrt(pc_residual_var_global)
pc_local_resid_sd_mean <- pc_residual_sd

cat("\nFull residual SD summary")
cat(sprintf("  SD (PC1-5): %.3f %.3f %.3f %.3f %.3f\n",
            pc_residual_sd[1], pc_residual_sd[2], pc_residual_sd[3],
            pc_residual_sd[4], pc_residual_sd[5]))
cat(sprintf("  Mean SD : %.3f   Max SD: %.3f\n",
            mean(pc_residual_sd), max(pc_residual_sd)))
cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

```

```{r}
# ==============================================================================
#  MFPCA RECONSTRUCTION VALIDATION (BEFORE GP)
# ==============================================================================
# This section checks how well MFPCA reconstructs the original densities
# using the TRUE scores (not GP-predicted scores). This isolates MFPCA error
# from GP prediction error.
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n=== Validating MFPCA Reconstruction (before GP) ===\n")

# Extract mean functions and eigenfunctions
mu_x_mfpca <- as.vector(mfpca_fit$meanFunction[[1]]@X)
mu_y_mfpca <- as.vector(mfpca_fit$meanFunction[[2]]@X)
mu_z_mfpca <- as.vector(mfpca_fit$meanFunction[[3]]@X)

phi_x_mfpca <- mfpca_fit$functions[[1]]@X
phi_y_mfpca <- mfpca_fit$functions[[2]]@X
phi_z_mfpca <- mfpca_fit$functions[[3]]@X
ind_var_explained <- 100 * mfpca_fit$values / sum(mfpca_fit$values)
# Inverse square-root density transform for reconstruction validation
inv_clr_validate <- function(sqrt_vec, grid) {
  sqrt_vec <- pmax(as.numeric(sqrt_vec), 0)
  dens_raw <- sqrt_vec^2
  delta <- diff(range(grid)) / (length(grid) - 1)
  mass <- sum(dens_raw) * delta
  if (!is.finite(mass) || mass <= 0) {
    dens_raw <- rep(1 / diff(range(grid)), length(grid))
    mass <- sum(dens_raw) * delta
  }
  dens_raw / mass
}

# Reconstruct all observations using TRUE MFPCA scores
scores_true <- as.matrix(scores)  # True MFPCA scores (n x K)

# Square-root density reconstruction: mean + scores %*% eigenfunctions
recon_clr_x_true <- sweep(scores_true %*% phi_x_mfpca, 2, mu_x_mfpca, "+")
recon_clr_y_true <- sweep(scores_true %*% phi_y_mfpca, 2, mu_y_mfpca, "+")
recon_clr_z_true <- sweep(scores_true %*% phi_z_mfpca, 2, mu_z_mfpca, "+")

# Convert square-root density functions back to densities on the original X/Y/Z grids
recon_dens_x_true <- t(apply(recon_clr_x_true, 1, inv_clr_validate, grid = x_grid))
recon_dens_y_true <- t(apply(recon_clr_y_true, 1, inv_clr_validate, grid = y_grid))
recon_dens_z_true <- t(apply(recon_clr_z_true, 1, inv_clr_validate, grid = z_grid))

# Compute ISE for MFPCA reconstruction
compute_ISE_mfpca <- function(f1, f2, grid) {
  delta <- diff(range(grid)) / (length(grid) - 1)
  sum((f1 - f2)^2) * delta
}

ise_mfpca_x <- sapply(1:nrow(dens_mat_x), function(i)
  compute_ISE_mfpca(recon_dens_x_true[i,], dens_mat_x[i,], x_grid))
ise_mfpca_y <- sapply(1:nrow(dens_mat_y), function(i)
  compute_ISE_mfpca(recon_dens_y_true[i,], dens_mat_y[i,], y_grid))
ise_mfpca_z <- sapply(1:nrow(dens_mat_z), function(i)
  compute_ISE_mfpca(recon_dens_z_true[i,], dens_mat_z[i,], z_grid))
ise_x_raw_space <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(dens_mat_x)), function(i)
  compute_ISE_mfpca(recon_dens_x_true[i, ], dens_mat_x[i, ], x_grid))
ise_x_final_density <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(dens_mat_x)), function(i)
  compute_ISE_mfpca(recon_dens_x_true[i, ], dens_mat_x[i, ], x_grid))
ise_z_raw_space <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(dens_mat_z)), function(i)
  compute_ISE_mfpca(recon_dens_z_true[i, ], dens_mat_z[i, ], z_grid))
ise_z_final_density <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(dens_mat_z)), function(i)
  compute_ISE_mfpca(recon_dens_z_true[i, ], dens_mat_z[i, ], z_grid))

cat("\nMFPCA Reconstruction Error (Mean ISE, using TRUE scores):\n")
cat("  X (Period):   ", sprintf("%.6f", mean(ise_mfpca_x)), "\n")
cat("  Y (Duration): ", sprintf("%.6f", mean(ise_mfpca_y)), "\n")
cat("  Z (Hill):     ", sprintf("%.6f", mean(ise_mfpca_z)), "\n")
cat("  X raw-space ISE:     ", sprintf("%.6f", mean(ise_x_raw_space)), "\n")
cat("  X final density ISE: ", sprintf("%.6f", mean(ise_x_final_density)), "\n")
cat("  Z raw-space ISE:     ", sprintf("%.6f", mean(ise_z_raw_space)), "\n")
cat("  Z final density ISE: ", sprintf("%.6f", mean(ise_z_final_density)), "\n")

```
```{r}

# ==============================================================================
# 6. INPUT WARPING GP (BETA CDF TRANSFORMATION)
# ==============================================================================
# THE ROOT SOLUTION: Instead of fighting the GP to handle sharp peaks and flat
# trends simultaneously, we WARP the x-axis.
#
# CONCEPT:
# - Stretch regions where data is dense (the peaks)
# - Squash regions where data is sparse (flat regions)
# - After warping, the sharp "spike" becomes a nice wide "hill"
# - A standard, stable GP can then fit it perfectly!
#
# METHOD: Empirical CDF Warping
# - warp(x) = F(x) = proportion of training points
# - Dense regions
# - Sparse regions
# - Result: uniform distribution in warped space
#
# ADVANTAGE: No local windows, no manual constraints, no hacks!
# ==============================================================================

# --- Matern 3/2 Covariance (allows sharp features) ---
matern32_cov <- function(X1, X2, lengthscale, sigma2) {
  X1 <- as.numeric(X1)
  X2 <- as.numeric(X2)
  n1 <- length(X1)
  n2 <- length(X2)
  
  ell <- lengthscale
  r <- outer(X1/ell, X2/ell, function(a, b) abs(a - b))
  sqrt3_r <- sqrt(3) * r
  K <- sigma2 * (1 + sqrt3_r) * exp(-sqrt3_r)
  
  matrix(K, nrow = n1, ncol = n2)
}

matern52_cov <- function(X1, X2, lengthscale, sigma2) {
  X1 <- as.numeric(X1)
  X2 <- as.numeric(X2)
  n1 <- length(X1)
  n2 <- length(X2)

  ell <- lengthscale
  r <- outer(X1/ell, X2/ell, function(a, b) abs(a - b))
  sqrt5_r <- sqrt(5) * r
  K <- sigma2 * (1 + sqrt5_r + 5 * r^2 / 3) * exp(-sqrt5_r)

  matrix(K, nrow = n1, ncol = n2)
}

get_kernel_cov <- function(kernel) {
  switch(kernel,
         matern32 = matern32_cov,
         matern52 = matern52_cov,
         stop("Unsupported kernel: ", kernel))
}

# ==============================================================================
# Input Warping Functions
# ==============================================================================

# Create empirical CDF warping function from training data
# stretch_factor > 1: spreads data MORE (amplifies warping)
# stretch_factor = 1: standard ECDF (default, already uniform)
# stretch_factor < 1: reduces warping effect
create_ecdf_warper <- function(X_train, stretch_factor = 1.0) {
  X_train <- as.numeric(X_train)
  X_sorted <- sort(X_train)
  n <- length(X_sorted)
  
  # Empirical CDF: F(x) = proportion of points
  # Use linear interpolation for smooth warping
  list(
    X_sorted = X_sorted,
    n = n,
    stretch_factor = stretch_factor,
    # Warp function: x
    warp = function(x) {
      # For each x, find proportion of training points
      # Using approx for smooth interpolation
      ecdf_vals <- (1:n) / n
      warped <- approx(X_sorted, ecdf_vals, xout = x, rule = 2, ties = mean)$y
      
      # Apply stretch factor via power transform centered at 0.5
      # stretch_factor > 1: pushes values away from 0.5 (more spread)
      # stretch_factor < 1: pulls values toward 0.5 (less spread)
      if (stretch_factor != 1.0) {
        # Transform to [-1, 1], apply signed power, transform back
        centered <- 2 * warped - 1  # [0,1] -> [-1,1]
        sign_centered <- sign(centered)
        stretched <- sign_centered * abs(centered)^(1/stretch_factor)
        warped <- (stretched + 1) / 2  # [-1,1] -> [0,1]
      }
      
      warped
    },
    # Store range for reference
    x_min = min(X_sorted),
    x_max = max(X_sorted)
  )
}

# ==============================================================================
# Warped known-noise GP used by the residual-GP method
# ==============================================================================
# Fits PC score targets with fixed known observation noise:
#   y_j = f(u_j) + eps_j,    eps_j ~ N(0, obs_noise_var)
#
# obs_noise_var is fixed by the caller. In Option A this is a small per-PC
# residual-GP nugget floor, not the full residual variance. The optimizer only
# estimates the latent output scale and lengthscale; beta is profiled by GLS.
# Predictive variance is the latent posterior Var[f(theta*)] unless
# add_observation_noise = TRUE is requested.
# ==============================================================================

bounded_logit <- function(x, lower, upper, eps = 1e-6) {
  z <- (x - lower) / (upper - lower)
  qlogis(pmin(pmax(z, eps), 1 - eps))
}

make_gp_mean_basis <- function(x_warped, mean_type) {
  mean_type <- match.arg(mean_type, c("constant", "linear"))
  if (mean_type == "constant") {
    return(matrix(1, nrow = length(x_warped), ncol = 1))
  }
  cbind(1, x_warped)
}

fit_known_noise_warped_gp <- function(X_train, y_train, warper,
                                      obs_noise_var,
                                      min_ls = 0.08,
                                      max_ls = 1.0,
                                      kernel = "matern32",
                                      mean_type = "linear",
                                      standardize_y = TRUE,
                                      n_restarts = 7L) {
  X_train <- as.numeric(X_train)
  y_train <- as.numeric(y_train)
  n <- length(X_train)
  if (length(obs_noise_var) == 1L) {
    obs_noise_var <- rep(obs_noise_var, n)
  }
  obs_noise_var <- pmax(as.numeric(obs_noise_var), 1e-10)

  X_warped <- warper$warp(X_train)

  if (standardize_y) {
    y_mean <- mean(y_train)
    y_sd <- sd(y_train)
    if (y_sd < 1e-10) y_sd <- 1
    y_std <- (y_train - y_mean) / y_sd
  } else {
    y_mean <- 0
    y_sd <- 1
    y_std <- y_train
  }

  obs_noise_var_std <- pmax(obs_noise_var / (y_sd^2), 1e-10)

  cov_func <- get_kernel_cov(kernel)

  H <- make_gp_mean_basis(X_warped, mean_type)
  y_var <- var(y_std)
  if (!is.finite(y_var) || y_var < 1e-10) y_var <- 1

  gp_negloglik <- function(params) {
    ls <- min_ls + (max_ls - min_ls) / (1 + exp(-params[1]))
    s2 <- exp(params[2])

    K <- cov_func(X_warped, X_warped, ls, s2) + diag(obs_noise_var_std, n)
    L <- tryCatch(chol(K), error = function(e) {
      tryCatch(chol(K + 1e-6 * diag(n)), error = function(e) NULL)
    })
    if (is.null(L)) return(1e10)

    Kinv_H <- backsolve(L, forwardsolve(t(L), H))
    Kinv_y <- backsolve(L, forwardsolve(t(L), y_std))

    beta <- tryCatch(
      solve(crossprod(H, Kinv_H) + 1e-8 * diag(ncol(H)), crossprod(H, Kinv_y)),
      error = function(e) {
        beta_fallback <- rep(0, ncol(H))
        beta_fallback[1] <- mean(y_std)
        beta_fallback
      }
    )

    resid <- y_std - H %*% beta
    alpha <- backsolve(L, forwardsolve(t(L), resid))
    nll <- 0.5 * sum(resid * alpha) + sum(log(diag(L))) + 0.5 * n * log(2 * pi)

    if (!is.finite(nll)) 1e10 else nll
  }

  ls_starts <- unique(c(
    min_ls + 0.10 * (max_ls - min_ls),
    min_ls + 0.25 * (max_ls - min_ls),
    min_ls + 0.50 * (max_ls - min_ls),
    min_ls + 0.75 * (max_ls - min_ls),
    min_ls + 0.90 * (max_ls - min_ls)
  ))
  s2_starts <- unique(pmax(c(0.25, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 4.0) * y_var, 1e-4))
  start_grid <- expand.grid(ls = ls_starts, s2 = s2_starts)
  start_grid$score <- abs(start_grid$ls - median(ls_starts)) +
    abs(log(start_grid$s2) - log(y_var))
  start_grid <- start_grid[order(start_grid$score), , drop = FALSE]
  start_grid <- head(start_grid, n_restarts)

  opt_list <- vector("list", nrow(start_grid))
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(start_grid))) {
    init_params <- c(
      bounded_logit(start_grid$ls[i], min_ls, max_ls),
      log(start_grid$s2[i])
    )
    opt_list[[i]] <- tryCatch(
      optim(init_params, fn = gp_negloglik, method = "L-BFGS-B",
            control = list(maxit = 300)),
      error = function(e) list(par = init_params, value = Inf, convergence = 1)
    )
  }
  opt_values <- sapply(opt_list, function(o) if (!is.null(o$value)) o$value else Inf)
  opt <- opt_list[[which.min(opt_values)]]

  final_ls <- min_ls + (max_ls - min_ls) / (1 + exp(-opt$par[1]))
  final_s2 <- exp(opt$par[2])

  K_final <- cov_func(X_warped, X_warped, final_ls, final_s2) +
    diag(obs_noise_var_std, n)
  L_final <- tryCatch(chol(K_final), error = function(e) {
    chol(K_final + 1e-6 * diag(n))
  })

  Kinv_H <- backsolve(L_final, forwardsolve(t(L_final), H))
  Kinv_y <- backsolve(L_final, forwardsolve(t(L_final), y_std))
  beta_final <- as.numeric(
    solve(crossprod(H, Kinv_H) + 1e-8 * diag(ncol(H)), crossprod(H, Kinv_y))
  )

  resid_final <- y_std - H %*% beta_final
  alpha_final <- as.numeric(backsolve(L_final, forwardsolve(t(L_final), resid_final)))

  list(
    X_train = X_train,
    X_warped = X_warped,
    y_train = y_train,
    y_std = y_std,
    y_mean = y_mean,
    y_sd = y_sd,
    n_train = n,
    warper = warper,
    lengthscale = final_ls,
    sigma2 = final_s2,
    obs_noise_var = obs_noise_var,
    obs_noise_var_std = obs_noise_var_std,
    kernel = kernel,
    mean_type = mean_type,
    beta = beta_final,
    H = H,
    L = L_final,
    alpha = alpha_final,
    nll = opt$value,
    n_restarts = nrow(start_grid),
    model_type = "KNOWN_NOISE_GP"
  )
}

predict_known_noise_warped_gp <- function(model, X_new, return_var = FALSE,
                                          add_observation_noise = FALSE) {
  X_new <- as.numeric(X_new)
  n_new <- length(X_new)
  X_new_warped <- model$warper$warp(X_new)

  cov_func <- get_kernel_cov(model$kernel)

  H_new <- make_gp_mean_basis(X_new_warped, model$mean_type)
  mean_linear <- as.numeric(H_new %*% model$beta)
  K_star <- cov_func(model$X_warped, X_new_warped, model$lengthscale, model$sigma2)
  mu_gp <- as.numeric(crossprod(K_star, model$alpha))
  mu_std <- mean_linear + mu_gp
  mu <- mu_std * model$y_sd + model$y_mean

  if (return_var) {
    K_ss_diag <- rep(model$sigma2, n_new)
    v <- forwardsolve(t(model$L), K_star)
    var_gp_std <- pmax(K_ss_diag - colSums(v^2), 0)
    var_gp <- var_gp_std * (model$y_sd^2)
    obs_var <- rep(mean(model$obs_noise_var), n_new)
    var_out <- var_gp + if (add_observation_noise) obs_var else 0

    return(list(
      mean = mu,
      var = var_out,
      var_gp = var_gp,
      var_noise = obs_var
    ))
  }

  mu
}

# ==============================================================================
# Train/Test Split: HOLD OUT ENTIRE THETA VALUES
# ==============================================================================
# Each theta value has one KDE-derived density curve and one MFPCA score vector.
# The residual GP is fit to raw-minus-LOESS residual scores. The LOESS trend is
# added back to GP residual predictions before density reconstruction.
# ==============================================================================

set.seed(123)
theta_list <- ufpca_scores_long$theta
n_theta_unique <- length(theta_list)
n_test_theta   <- max(2, round(0.2 * n_theta_unique))
n_train_theta  <- n_theta_unique - n_test_theta

# Hold out entire theta values (evenly spaced across the range for good coverage)
test_theta_idx  <- round(seq(2, n_theta_unique - 1, length.out = n_test_theta))
train_theta_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(n_theta_unique), test_theta_idx)

train_theta_vals <- theta_list[train_theta_idx]
test_theta_vals  <- theta_list[test_theta_idx]

# One row per theta throughout
pc_cols <- paste0("PC", 1:M_components)
train_scores_raw <- ufpca_scores_raw_aligned[train_theta_idx, pc_cols, drop = FALSE]
test_scores_raw  <- ufpca_scores_raw_aligned[test_theta_idx,  pc_cols, drop = FALSE]
train_scores_smoothed <- ufpca_scores_smoothed[train_theta_idx, pc_cols, drop = FALSE]
test_scores_smoothed  <- ufpca_scores_smoothed[test_theta_idx,  pc_cols, drop = FALSE]
train_scores <- ufpca_scores_resid[train_theta_idx, pc_cols, drop = FALSE]
test_scores  <- ufpca_scores_resid[test_theta_idx,  pc_cols, drop = FALSE]
train_scores_mean <- train_scores
test_scores_mean  <- test_scores
train_indices <- train_theta_idx
test_indices  <- test_theta_idx

cat("\n=== THETA-LEVEL TRAIN/TEST SPLIT ===\n")
cat("Goal: predict density at unseen theta values\n")
cat("  - Total theta values:       ", n_theta_unique, "\n")
cat("  - Training theta values:    ", n_train_theta, "\n")
cat("  - Test theta values:        ", n_test_theta, "\n")
cat("  - Train theta range: [", round(min(train_theta_vals), 2), ",",
    round(max(train_theta_vals), 2), "]\n")
cat("  - Test theta values:", paste(round(test_theta_vals, 2), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("  - GP emulates raw-minus-LOESS residual PC scores\n")
cat("  - LOESS trend is added back to GP residual predictions\n")
cat("  - Posterior score variance is GP posterior variance only\n")
cat("\nResidual-GP nugget used by the likelihood:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Residual var (PC1-5): %.4f %.4f %.4f %.4f %.4f\n",
            sigma2_resid_k[1], sigma2_resid_k[2], sigma2_resid_k[3],
            sigma2_resid_k[4], sigma2_resid_k[5]))
cat(sprintf("  Obs noise floor (PC1-5): %.5f %.5f %.5f %.5f %.5f\n",
            obs_noise_floor_k[1], obs_noise_floor_k[2], obs_noise_floor_k[3],
            obs_noise_floor_k[4], obs_noise_floor_k[5]))

# Visualise the split
par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1))
plot(theta_list, rep(1, n_theta_unique), pch = 16, cex = 1.2,
     col = ifelse(seq_len(n_theta_unique) %in% train_theta_idx, "steelblue", "tomato"),
     yaxt = "n", ylim = c(0.5, 1.5),
     main = "Train / Test Theta Split",
     xlab = expression(theta), ylab = "")
legend("topright", c("Train theta", "Test theta (held out)"),
       pch = 16, col = c("steelblue", "tomato"), cex = 0.8)

# Plot of PC1 residual training scores by theta
pc1_train <- train_scores[, "PC1"]
plot(train_theta_vals, pc1_train, pch = 19, col = "steelblue",
     main = "PC1 Residual Score vs Theta (training)",
     xlab = expression(theta), ylab = "Residual PC1 Score")
lo <- loess(pc1_train ~ train_theta_vals, span = 0.5)
x_s <- sort(train_theta_vals)
lines(x_s, predict(lo, newdata = data.frame(train_theta_vals = x_s)),
      col = "navy", lwd = 2)

cat("\n[OK] Theta-level split complete\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

```

### Pre-GP check: raw, LOESS trend, and residual MFPCA scores

```{r smoothed_score_diagnostics_pre_gp, fig.width=14, fig.height=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==============================================================================
# PRE-GP DIAGNOSTIC: Evaluate Option A score decomposition
# ==============================================================================
# The GP below is trained on residual scores:
#   residual_k(theta) = raw_k(theta) - fixed-span LOESS trend_k(theta).
# Prediction in score space is LOESS trend + GP residual mean. This chunk keeps
# the raw-vs-smoothed visual overlays and adds residual diagnostics before GP fit:
#   1. raw-vs-smoothed agreement by PC,
#   2. residual variance targeted by the GP,
#   3. train/test raw-vs-smoothed RMSE,
#   4. visual overlays of raw MFPCA scores, LOESS-smoothed scores, and residuals.
# ==============================================================================

safe_cor <- function(a, b) {
  a <- as.numeric(a)
  b <- as.numeric(b)
  ok <- is.finite(a) & is.finite(b)
  if (sum(ok) < 3 || sd(a[ok]) < 1e-12 || sd(b[ok]) < 1e-12) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  cor(a[ok], b[ok])
}

score_smoothing_summary <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(pc_cols), function(j) {
  pc_col <- pc_cols[j]

  raw_all    <- as.numeric(ufpca_scores_raw_aligned[[pc_col]])
  smooth_all <- as.numeric(ufpca_scores_smoothed[[pc_col]])
  resid_all  <- as.numeric(ufpca_scores_resid[[pc_col]])

  raw_var    <- var(raw_all, na.rm = TRUE)
  smooth_var <- var(smooth_all, na.rm = TRUE)
  resid_var  <- var(resid_all, na.rm = TRUE)

  data.frame(
    PC = pc_col,
    raw_var = raw_var,
    smooth_var = smooth_var,
    resid_var = resid_var,
    resid_sd = sqrt(pmax(resid_var, 0)),
    loess_span = loess_span_k[j],
    obs_noise_floor = obs_noise_floor_k[j],
    raw_smooth_cor = safe_cor(raw_all, smooth_all),
    smooth_var_share = smooth_var / pmax(raw_var, 1e-12),
    resid_var_share = resid_var / pmax(raw_var, 1e-12),
    train_rmse_raw_smooth = sqrt(mean((as.numeric(train_scores_raw[[pc_col]]) -
                                         as.numeric(train_scores_smoothed[[pc_col]]))^2,
                                      na.rm = TRUE)),
    test_rmse_raw_smooth = sqrt(mean((as.numeric(test_scores_raw[[pc_col]]) -
                                        as.numeric(test_scores_smoothed[[pc_col]]))^2,
                                     na.rm = TRUE)),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))

score_smoothing_print <- score_smoothing_summary
num_cols <- vapply(score_smoothing_print, is.numeric, logical(1))
score_smoothing_print[num_cols] <- lapply(score_smoothing_print[num_cols],
                                          function(x) round(x, 4))

cat("\n=== PRE-GP OPTION A MFPCA SCORE DIAGNOSTIC ===\n")
cat("GP target: raw MFPCA score - fixed-span LOESS trend\n")
cat("Prediction: fixed-span LOESS trend + GP residual mean\n")
cat("Raw vs smoothed overlays are retained to show the trend component.\n\n")
print(head(score_smoothing_print, 10), row.names = FALSE)

cat("\nSummary over PCs used by the GP:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Mean raw-smoothed correlation: %.3f\n",
            mean(score_smoothing_summary$raw_smooth_cor, na.rm = TRUE)))
cat(sprintf("  Mean smooth variance share:   %.3f\n",
            mean(score_smoothing_summary$smooth_var_share, na.rm = TRUE)))
cat(sprintf("  Mean residual variance share: %.3f\n",
            mean(score_smoothing_summary$resid_var_share, na.rm = TRUE)))
cat(sprintf("  Mean train raw-smooth RMSE:   %.4f\n",
            mean(score_smoothing_summary$train_rmse_raw_smooth, na.rm = TRUE)))
cat(sprintf("  Mean test raw-smooth RMSE:    %.4f\n",
            mean(score_smoothing_summary$test_rmse_raw_smooth, na.rm = TRUE)))
cat(sprintf("  Mean full residual variance:  %.5f\n",
            mean(score_smoothing_summary$resid_var, na.rm = TRUE)))
cat(sprintf("  Mean residual-GP noise floor: %.5f\n",
            mean(score_smoothing_summary$obs_noise_floor, na.rm = TRUE)))

score_order <- order(theta_list)
theta_sorted <- theta_list[score_order]
pc_plot_set <- seq_len(min(6, length(pc_cols)))
pc_resid_plot_groups <- split(seq_along(pc_cols), ceiling(seq_along(pc_cols) / 6))

plot_raw_smoothed_scores <- function(pc_set, main_title) {
  n_plot <- length(pc_set)
  old_par <- par(no.readonly = TRUE)
  on.exit(par(old_par), add = TRUE)
  par(mfrow = c(ceiling(n_plot / 3), min(3, n_plot)),
      mar = c(4.0, 4.2, 3.0, 1.0),
      oma = c(0, 0, 3, 0))

  for (idx in seq_along(pc_set)) {
    pc <- pc_set[idx]
    pc_col <- paste0("PC", pc)
    raw_s <- as.numeric(ufpca_scores_raw_aligned[score_order, pc_col])
    smooth_s <- as.numeric(ufpca_scores_smoothed[score_order, pc_col])

    plot(theta_sorted, raw_s,
         type = "b", pch = 16, cex = 0.45, lwd = 0.8,
         col = adjustcolor("gray35", alpha.f = 0.55),
         main = paste0(pc_col, ": raw vs LOESS-smoothed"),
         xlab = expression(theta), ylab = "MFPCA score")
    lines(theta_sorted, smooth_s, col = "steelblue4", lwd = 2.3)
    points(test_theta_vals, ufpca_scores_raw_aligned[test_theta_idx, pc_col],
           pch = 21, bg = "tomato", col = "white", cex = 1.0)
    points(test_theta_vals, ufpca_scores_smoothed[test_theta_idx, pc_col],
           pch = 24, bg = "navy", col = "white", cex = 1.0)
    abline(h = 0, col = "gray80", lty = 2)

    usr <- par("usr")
    text(usr[1] + 0.03 * diff(usr[1:2]),
         usr[4] - 0.10 * diff(usr[3:4]),
         labels = sprintf("corr=%.2f | resid share=%.2f",
                          score_smoothing_summary$raw_smooth_cor[pc],
                          score_smoothing_summary$resid_var_share[pc]),
         adj = c(0, 0), cex = 0.78)

    if (idx == 1) {
      legend("bottomright",
             c("Raw MFPCA score", "LOESS-smoothed score",
               "Held-out raw", "Held-out smoothed"),
             col = c(adjustcolor("gray35", alpha.f = 0.55), "steelblue4",
                     "white", "white"),
             pt.bg = c(NA, NA, "tomato", "navy"),
             pch = c(16, NA, 21, 24),
             lty = c(1, 1, NA, NA),
             lwd = c(0.8, 2.3, NA, NA),
             cex = 0.72, bty = "n")
    }
  }
  mtext(main_title, outer = TRUE, line = 1.0, cex = 1.15, font = 2)
}

plot_score_residuals <- function(pc_set, main_title) {
  n_plot <- length(pc_set)
  old_par <- par(no.readonly = TRUE)
  on.exit(par(old_par), add = TRUE)
  par(mfrow = c(ceiling(n_plot / 3), min(3, n_plot)),
      mar = c(4.0, 4.2, 3.0, 1.0),
      oma = c(0, 0, 3, 0))

  for (idx in seq_along(pc_set)) {
    pc <- pc_set[idx]
    pc_col <- paste0("PC", pc)
    raw_s <- as.numeric(ufpca_scores_raw_aligned[score_order, pc_col])
    smooth_s <- as.numeric(ufpca_scores_smoothed[score_order, pc_col])
    resid_s <- as.numeric(ufpca_scores_resid[score_order, pc_col])
    resid_sd <- sqrt(sigma2_resid_k[pc])

    plot(theta_sorted, resid_s,
         type = "h", lwd = 1.1,
         col = adjustcolor("firebrick3", alpha.f = 0.65),
         main = sprintf("%s: residual (span=%.3f)", pc_col, loess_span_k[pc]),
         xlab = expression(theta), ylab = "Residual score")
    points(theta_sorted, resid_s, pch = 16, cex = 0.35,
           col = adjustcolor("firebrick4", alpha.f = 0.65))
    abline(h = 0, col = "gray35", lty = 1)
    abline(h = c(-1, 1) * resid_sd, col = "gray55", lty = 3)

    usr <- par("usr")
    text(usr[1] + 0.03 * diff(usr[1:2]),
         usr[4] - 0.10 * diff(usr[3:4]),
         labels = sprintf("Var(resid)=%.4f | nugget=%.5f",
                          sigma2_resid_k[pc], obs_noise_floor_k[pc]),
         adj = c(0, 0), cex = 0.78)
  }
  mtext(main_title, outer = TRUE, line = 1.0, cex = 1.15, font = 2)
}

plot_raw_smoothed_scores(
  pc_plot_set,
  "Pre-GP MFPCA Score Check: Raw Scores and Fixed-Span LOESS Trends"
)

for (pc_group in pc_resid_plot_groups) {
  plot_score_residuals(
    pc_group,
    sprintf("Pre-GP Option A Check: Residual Scores Modeled by GP (PC%d-PC%d)",
            min(pc_group), max(pc_group))
  )
}
```

### Pre-GP check: density reconstruction from raw vs smoothed scores

```{r raw_vs_smoothed_score_density_reconstruction, fig.width=15, fig.height=10, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ==============================================================================
# PRE-GP DIAGNOSTIC: Density reconstruction from raw vs LOESS-smoothed scores
# ==============================================================================
# This chunk compares three density curves at representative theta values:
#   1. raw KDE target,
#   2. MFPCA reconstruction using raw sign-aligned MFPCA scores,
#   3. MFPCA reconstruction using LOESS-smoothed MFPCA scores.
#
# The goal is to isolate the effect of score smoothing before the GP is fit.
# ==============================================================================

reconstruct_density_from_scores <- function(score_mat, mu_vec, phi_mat, grid) {
  sqrt_mat <- sweep(score_mat %*% phi_mat, 2, mu_vec, "+")
  t(apply(sqrt_mat, 1, inv_clr_validate, grid = grid))
}

scores_raw_for_recon <- as.matrix(ufpca_scores_raw_aligned[, pc_cols, drop = FALSE])
scores_smooth_for_recon <- as.matrix(ufpca_scores_smoothed[, pc_cols, drop = FALSE])

recon_dens_x_raw_scores <- reconstruct_density_from_scores(
  scores_raw_for_recon, mu_x_mfpca, phi_x_mfpca, x_grid
)
recon_dens_y_raw_scores <- reconstruct_density_from_scores(
  scores_raw_for_recon, mu_y_mfpca, phi_y_mfpca, y_grid
)
recon_dens_z_raw_scores <- reconstruct_density_from_scores(
  scores_raw_for_recon, mu_z_mfpca, phi_z_mfpca, z_grid
)

recon_dens_x_smoothed_scores <- reconstruct_density_from_scores(
  scores_smooth_for_recon, mu_x_mfpca, phi_x_mfpca, x_grid
)
recon_dens_y_smoothed_scores <- reconstruct_density_from_scores(
  scores_smooth_for_recon, mu_y_mfpca, phi_y_mfpca, y_grid
)
recon_dens_z_smoothed_scores <- reconstruct_density_from_scores(
  scores_smooth_for_recon, mu_z_mfpca, phi_z_mfpca, z_grid
)

ise_raw_score_recon_x <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(dens_mat_x)), function(i)
  compute_ISE_mfpca(recon_dens_x_raw_scores[i, ], dens_mat_x[i, ], x_grid))
ise_raw_score_recon_y <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(dens_mat_y)), function(i)
  compute_ISE_mfpca(recon_dens_y_raw_scores[i, ], dens_mat_y[i, ], y_grid))
ise_raw_score_recon_z <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(dens_mat_z)), function(i)
  compute_ISE_mfpca(recon_dens_z_raw_scores[i, ], dens_mat_z[i, ], z_grid))

ise_smoothed_score_recon_x <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(dens_mat_x)), function(i)
  compute_ISE_mfpca(recon_dens_x_smoothed_scores[i, ], dens_mat_x[i, ], x_grid))
ise_smoothed_score_recon_y <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(dens_mat_y)), function(i)
  compute_ISE_mfpca(recon_dens_y_smoothed_scores[i, ], dens_mat_y[i, ], y_grid))
ise_smoothed_score_recon_z <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(dens_mat_z)), function(i)
  compute_ISE_mfpca(recon_dens_z_smoothed_scores[i, ], dens_mat_z[i, ], z_grid))

ise_raw_vs_smoothed_x <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(dens_mat_x)), function(i)
  compute_ISE_mfpca(recon_dens_x_raw_scores[i, ],
                    recon_dens_x_smoothed_scores[i, ], x_grid))
ise_raw_vs_smoothed_y <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(dens_mat_y)), function(i)
  compute_ISE_mfpca(recon_dens_y_raw_scores[i, ],
                    recon_dens_y_smoothed_scores[i, ], y_grid))
ise_raw_vs_smoothed_z <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(dens_mat_z)), function(i)
  compute_ISE_mfpca(recon_dens_z_raw_scores[i, ],
                    recon_dens_z_smoothed_scores[i, ], z_grid))

recon_score_smoothing_summary <- data.frame(
  Variable = c("X", "Y", "Z"),
  RawScore_vs_KDE_ISE = c(mean(ise_raw_score_recon_x),
                          mean(ise_raw_score_recon_y),
                          mean(ise_raw_score_recon_z)),
  SmoothedScore_vs_KDE_ISE = c(mean(ise_smoothed_score_recon_x),
                               mean(ise_smoothed_score_recon_y),
                               mean(ise_smoothed_score_recon_z)),
  Smoothed_minus_Raw_ISE = c(mean(ise_smoothed_score_recon_x - ise_raw_score_recon_x),
                             mean(ise_smoothed_score_recon_y - ise_raw_score_recon_y),
                             mean(ise_smoothed_score_recon_z - ise_raw_score_recon_z)),
  RawScore_vs_SmoothedScore_ISE = c(mean(ise_raw_vs_smoothed_x),
                                    mean(ise_raw_vs_smoothed_y),
                                    mean(ise_raw_vs_smoothed_z)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

recon_score_smoothing_print <- recon_score_smoothing_summary
num_cols <- vapply(recon_score_smoothing_print, is.numeric, logical(1))
recon_score_smoothing_print[num_cols] <- lapply(recon_score_smoothing_print[num_cols],
                                                function(x) round(x, 5))

cat("\n=== PRE-GP DENSITY RECONSTRUCTION: RAW SCORES VS SMOOTHED SCORES ===\n")
cat("Each row compares density reconstructions before GP fitting.\n")
print(recon_score_smoothing_print, row.names = FALSE)
cat("\nInterpretation:\n")
cat("  - RawScore_vs_KDE_ISE is the ordinary MFPCA reconstruction error.\n")
cat("  - SmoothedScore_vs_KDE_ISE shows what LOESS score smoothing changes before GP.\n")
cat("  - RawScore_vs_SmoothedScore_ISE is the density-space size of the smoothing effect.\n\n")

theta_order_recon <- order(theta_list)
n_theta_panels <- min(4L, length(theta_order_recon))
theta_panel_idx <- theta_order_recon[round(seq(1, length(theta_order_recon),
                                               length.out = n_theta_panels))]

plot_density_recon_panel <- function(grid, kde, raw_recon, smooth_recon,
                                     main_title, show_legend = FALSE,
                                     ylab = "Density") {
  y_max <- max(c(kde, raw_recon, smooth_recon), na.rm = TRUE)
  plot(grid, kde, type = "l", col = "black", lwd = 2.6,
       ylim = c(0, 1.08 * y_max),
       main = main_title, xlab = "", ylab = ylab)
  lines(grid, raw_recon, col = "steelblue4", lwd = 2.1)
  lines(grid, smooth_recon, col = "darkorange3", lwd = 2.1, lty = 2)
  if (show_legend) {
    legend("topright",
           c("Raw KDE target", "Raw-score MFPCA recon",
             "Smoothed-score recon"),
           col = c("black", "steelblue4", "darkorange3"),
           lwd = c(2.6, 2.1, 2.1), lty = c(1, 1, 2),
           cex = 0.72, bty = "n")
  }
}

old_par <- par(no.readonly = TRUE)
par(mfrow = c(length(theta_panel_idx), 3),
    mar = c(3.2, 4.0, 2.4, 0.8),
    oma = c(2.0, 0, 3.2, 0))

for (row_i in seq_along(theta_panel_idx)) {
  i <- theta_panel_idx[row_i]
  theta_label <- sprintf("theta = %.3f", theta_list[i])

  plot_density_recon_panel(
    x_grid, dens_mat_x[i, ],
    recon_dens_x_raw_scores[i, ], recon_dens_x_smoothed_scores[i, ],
    paste("X |", theta_label),
    show_legend = row_i == 1L,
    ylab = "Density"
  )

  plot_density_recon_panel(
    y_grid, dens_mat_y[i, ],
    recon_dens_y_raw_scores[i, ], recon_dens_y_smoothed_scores[i, ],
    paste("Y |", theta_label),
    show_legend = FALSE,
    ylab = ""
  )

  plot_density_recon_panel(
    z_grid, dens_mat_z[i, ],
    recon_dens_z_raw_scores[i, ], recon_dens_z_smoothed_scores[i, ],
    paste("Z |", theta_label),
    show_legend = FALSE,
    ylab = ""
  )
}

mtext("Raw KDE vs MFPCA Reconstruction from Raw and LOESS-Smoothed Scores",
      outer = TRUE, line = 1.2, cex = 1.18, font = 2)
mtext("Black = KDE target | Blue = raw-score reconstruction | Orange dashed = smoothed-score reconstruction",
      outer = TRUE, side = 1, line = 0.4, cex = 0.85)
par(old_par)

old_par <- par(no.readonly = TRUE)
par(mfrow = c(1, 3), mar = c(4.2, 4.3, 3.1, 1.0), oma = c(0, 0, 2.4, 0))

plot_recon_ise_by_theta <- function(theta_vals, raw_ise, smooth_ise,
                                    main_title, ylab = "ISE vs KDE") {
  ord <- order(theta_vals)
  y_max <- max(c(raw_ise, smooth_ise), na.rm = TRUE)
  plot(theta_vals[ord], raw_ise[ord], type = "b",
       pch = 16, cex = 0.55, lwd = 1.2,
       col = "steelblue4", ylim = c(0, 1.08 * y_max),
       main = main_title, xlab = expression(theta), ylab = ylab)
  lines(theta_vals[ord], smooth_ise[ord], type = "b",
        pch = 17, cex = 0.55, lwd = 1.2,
        col = "darkorange3", lty = 2)
  legend("topright",
         c("Raw-score recon", "Smoothed-score recon"),
         col = c("steelblue4", "darkorange3"),
         pch = c(16, 17), lty = c(1, 2), lwd = 1.2,
         cex = 0.72, bty = "n")
}

plot_recon_ise_by_theta(theta_list, ise_raw_score_recon_x,
                        ise_smoothed_score_recon_x, "X density")
plot_recon_ise_by_theta(theta_list, ise_raw_score_recon_y,
                        ise_smoothed_score_recon_y, "Y density", ylab = "")
plot_recon_ise_by_theta(theta_list, ise_raw_score_recon_z,
                        ise_smoothed_score_recon_z, "Z density", ylab = "")

mtext("Pre-GP Reconstruction Error by Theta: Raw Scores vs Smoothed Scores",
      outer = TRUE, line = 0.7, cex = 1.12, font = 2)
par(old_par)
```

```{r gp_input_warping_and_training, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ============================================================================== 
# GP INPUT WARPING AND TRAINING: RESIDUAL GP
# ============================================================================== 
# Current model: residual GP.
#   1. Detrend scores with fixed-span LOESS.
#   2. GP target = raw - LOESS.
#   3. Predict = LOESS(theta) + GP(theta).
#   4. Posterior variance = GP posterior var (no post-hoc additive nugget).
# ============================================================================== 

# Scaled inputs for GP (one value per training/test theta)
x_center <- mean(train_theta_vals)
x_scale  <- sd(train_theta_vals)
if (x_scale < 1e-10) x_scale <- 1

train_theta_raw  <- train_theta_vals
test_theta_raw   <- test_theta_vals
train_theta_norm <- (train_theta_raw - x_center) / x_scale
test_theta_norm  <- (test_theta_raw  - x_center) / x_scale

# ECDF input warping, matching the current paper method.
STRETCH_FACTOR <- 1.0
input_warper <- create_ecdf_warper(train_theta_norm, stretch_factor = STRETCH_FACTOR)
cat("Using Empirical CDF warping (stretch_factor=", STRETCH_FACTOR, ")\n", sep = "")

# GP settings in warped [0,1] space.
# MIN_LS was 0.02 and every PC pinned it; that meant the GP wanted to fit
# individual training residuals. Raise the floor so the GP is forced to pick
# a smooth solution. If the optimizer still hits MIN_LS for many PCs, the
# diagnostic table will flag it and the paper should adopt Apr29.
MIN_LS <- 0.30
MAX_LS <- 5.00
KERNEL <- "matern52"
MEAN_TYPE <- "constant"
PREDICT_OBSERVATION_NOISE <- FALSE

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n", sep = "")
cat("OPTION A RESIDUAL-GP TRAINING\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("Strategy: ECDF-warp theta, fit residual PC scores, add LOESS trend at prediction\n")
cat("  - Kernel:", KERNEL, "\n")
cat("  - Mean function:", MEAN_TYPE, "\n")
cat("  - Lengthscale bounds: [", MIN_LS, ", ", MAX_LS, "]\n", sep = "")
cat(sprintf("  - Residual-GP nugget floor (PC1-5): %s\n",
            paste(sprintf("%.5f", obs_noise_floor_k[1:min(5, length(obs_noise_floor_k))]),
                  collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("  - Residual var (PC1-5): %s\n",
            paste(sprintf("%.4f", sigma2_resid_k[1:min(5, length(sigma2_resid_k))]),
                  collapse = ", ")))
cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

pred_train_df <- data.frame(theta = train_theta_raw)
pred_test_df  <- data.frame(theta = test_theta_raw)
gp_models <- vector("list", M_components)

for (pc_idx in seq_len(M_components)) {
  col_name <- paste0("PC", pc_idx)
  train_y <- as.numeric(train_scores[[col_name]])
  obs_noise_k <- obs_noise_floor_k[pc_idx]

  model <- fit_known_noise_warped_gp(
    X_train = train_theta_norm,
    y_train = train_y,
    warper = input_warper,
    obs_noise_var = obs_noise_k,
    min_ls = MIN_LS,
    max_ls = MAX_LS,
    kernel = KERNEL,
    mean_type = MEAN_TYPE,
    standardize_y = TRUE
  )

  gp_models[[pc_idx]] <- model
  pred_train_df[[col_name]] <- predict_known_noise_warped_gp(
    model, train_theta_norm,
    add_observation_noise = PREDICT_OBSERVATION_NOISE
  )
  pred_test_df[[col_name]] <- predict_known_noise_warped_gp(
    model, test_theta_norm,
    add_observation_noise = PREDICT_OBSERVATION_NOISE
  )

  sigma2_fit_k <- model$sigma2 * (model$y_sd^2)
  snr_k <- sigma2_fit_k / obs_noise_floor_k[pc_idx]
  beta_text <- paste(sprintf("%.3f", model$beta), collapse = ", ")
  cat(sprintf(
    "PC%2d: resid_var=%.4f, fitted_GP_sigma2=%.4f, LS=%.4f, SNR=%.2f, nugget=%.5f, beta=[%s]\n",
    pc_idx, sigma2_resid_k[pc_idx], sigma2_fit_k,
    model$lengthscale, snr_k, obs_noise_k, beta_text
  ))
}

cat("\n=== GP boundary & SNR diagnostic ===\n")
cat(sprintf("%-4s %8s %10s %10s %8s %8s %8s\n",
            "PC", "LS", "fit_sigma2", "resid_var", "SNR", "minLS?", "maxLS?"))
n_at_min_boundary <- 0L
n_at_max_boundary <- 0L
for (pc_idx in seq_len(M_components)) {
  m <- gp_models[[pc_idx]]
  s2_fit <- m$sigma2 * (m$y_sd^2)
  snr <- s2_fit / mean(m$obs_noise_var)
  at_min <- abs(m$lengthscale - MIN_LS) < 1e-3
  at_max <- abs(m$lengthscale - MAX_LS) < 1e-3
  n_at_min_boundary <- n_at_min_boundary + as.integer(at_min)
  n_at_max_boundary <- n_at_max_boundary + as.integer(at_max)
  cat(sprintf("PC%-3d %8.4f %10.4f %10.4f %8.2f %8s %8s\n",
              pc_idx, m$lengthscale, s2_fit, sigma2_resid_k[pc_idx], snr,
              ifelse(at_min, "YES", ""), ifelse(at_max, "YES", "")))
}
pct_min <- 100 * sum(sapply(gp_models, function(m) abs(m$lengthscale - MIN_LS) < 1e-3)) / M_components
pct_max <- 100 * sum(sapply(gp_models, function(m) abs(m$lengthscale - MAX_LS) < 1e-3)) / M_components
snr_vec <- sapply(gp_models, function(m) (m$sigma2 * m$y_sd^2) / mean(m$obs_noise_var))
cat(sprintf("\nLengthscale boundary hits: MIN_LS %.1f%%   MAX_LS %.1f%%\n", pct_min, pct_max))
cat(sprintf("SNR summary: median %.1f, max %.1f\n", median(snr_vec), max(snr_vec)))
if (pct_min > 50) {
  cat("[WARN] More than half of PCs pinned at MIN_LS. GP wants to overfit.\n")
  cat("       Either raise MIN_LS further or accept that residuals are noise.\n")
}
if (median(snr_vec) > 1000) {
  cat("[WARN] Median SNR >> 1000. The nugget is far too small relative to fitted sigma2.\n")
  cat("       Increase obs_noise_floor_k.\n")
}

loess_train_df <- data.frame(theta = train_theta_vals)
loess_test_df  <- data.frame(theta = test_theta_vals)
for (pc in 1:n_pcs) {
  pc_col <- paste0("PC", pc)
  loess_train_df[[pc_col]] <- predict_loess_trend(loess_models[[pc]], train_theta_vals)
  loess_test_df[[pc_col]]  <- predict_loess_trend(loess_models[[pc]], test_theta_vals)
}

final_pred_train_df <- pred_train_df
final_pred_test_df  <- pred_test_df
for (pc in 1:n_pcs) {
  pc_col <- paste0("PC", pc)
  final_pred_train_df[[pc_col]] <- pred_train_df[[pc_col]] + loess_train_df[[pc_col]]
  final_pred_test_df[[pc_col]]  <- pred_test_df[[pc_col]]  + loess_test_df[[pc_col]]
}

# Verify fit: RMSE vs observed training scores
train_rmse <- sapply(seq_len(M_components), function(pc_idx) {
  col_name <- paste0("PC", pc_idx)
  true_vals <- as.numeric(train_scores[[col_name]])
  pred_vals <- pred_train_df[[col_name]]
  sqrt(mean((true_vals - pred_vals)^2))
})
cat("\n=== GP Fit Check (vs residual score targets per theta) ===\n")
cat("Mean training RMSE across PCs:", sprintf("%.4f", mean(train_rmse)), "\n")
if (mean(train_rmse) < 0.15) {
  cat("[OK] GP posterior mean tracks the residual training scores closely\n")
} else {
  cat("[INFO] Training RMSE is higher than expected for the residual target\n")
}
```
```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 6b. VISUALIZING GP RESULTS IN PC SPACE
# ==============================================================================

# Helper function for the residual known-noise GP.
get_gp_predictions <- function(model, X_new, return_var = TRUE) {
  predict_known_noise_warped_gp(
    model, X_new, return_var = return_var,
    add_observation_noise = PREDICT_OBSERVATION_NOISE
  )
}

# --- Plot 1: GP Fit Curves for First 6 PCs ---
par(mfrow = c(3, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1))

# Create fine grid for smooth prediction curves
theta_fine <- seq(min(train_theta_norm) - 0.1, max(train_theta_norm) + 0.1, length.out = 200)
theta_fine_orig <- theta_fine * x_scale + x_center

for (pc_idx in 1:min(6, M_components)) {
  col_name <- paste0("PC", pc_idx)
  model <- gp_models[[pc_idx]]
  
  # Get smooth prediction curve with latent GP variance.
  pred_fine <- get_gp_predictions(model, theta_fine, return_var = TRUE)

  # One observed score vector per theta; no score averaging is used.
  train_true <- train_scores[, col_name]
  test_true  <- test_scores[, col_name]

  train_pred <- pred_train_df[[col_name]]
  test_pred  <- pred_test_df[[col_name]]

  ls_val <- model$lengthscale

  pred_sd <- sqrt(pmax(pred_fine$var, 0))
  y_range <- range(c(train_true, test_true, pred_fine$mean + 1.96 * pred_sd,
                     pred_fine$mean - 1.96 * pred_sd), na.rm = TRUE)

  plot(train_theta_raw, train_true, pch = 16, col = "black", cex = 1.2,
       xlim = range(c(train_theta_raw, test_theta_raw)),
       ylim = y_range,
       main = paste0(col_name, " residual | LS=", round(ls_val, 4)),
       xlab = expression(theta), ylab = "Observed residual PC score")

  polygon(c(theta_fine_orig, rev(theta_fine_orig)),
          c(pred_fine$mean + 1.96 * pred_sd, rev(pred_fine$mean - 1.96 * pred_sd)),
          col = rgb(0, 0, 1, 0.15), border = NA)
  lines(theta_fine_orig, pred_fine$mean, col = "blue", lwd = 2)
  points(test_theta_raw, test_true, pch = 17, col = "red", cex = 1.2)

  legend("topright",
         c("Train residual", "Test residual (held out)", "GP residual fit", "95% interval"),
         pch = c(16, 17, NA, NA), lty = c(NA, NA, 1, NA),
         col = c("black", "red", "blue", rgb(0, 0, 1, 0.3)),
         fill = c(NA, NA, NA, rgb(0, 0, 1, 0.15)),
         border = c(NA, NA, NA, "transparent"),
         lwd = c(NA, NA, 2, NA), cex = 0.55, bg = "white")
}

# --- Plot 2a: Mean Score
par(mfrow = c(3, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 3, 0))
for (pc_idx in 1:min(6, M_components)) {
  col_name   <- paste0("PC", pc_idx)
  train_true <- train_scores[, col_name]
  train_pred <- pred_train_df[[col_name]]

  r2   <- if (var(train_true) > 1e-10 && var(train_pred) > 1e-10)
              cor(train_true, train_pred)^2 else 0
  rmse <- sqrt(mean((train_true - train_pred)^2))
  fit  <- lm(train_pred ~ train_true)

  plot_range <- range(c(train_true, train_pred))
  plot(train_true, train_pred, pch = 19, col = "steelblue", cex = 1.2,
       xlim = plot_range, ylim = plot_range,
       main = paste0(col_name, " | R\u00b2=", round(r2, 3), " | RMSE=", round(rmse, 3)),
       xlab = "Observed Residual Score", ylab = "GP Residual Mean")
  abline(0, 1, col = "red", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
  abline(fit, col = "darkgreen", lwd = 1.5)
  legend("topleft", c("1:1 line", "OLS fit"),
         col = c("red", "darkgreen"), lty = c(2, 1), lwd = c(2, 1.5), cex = 0.7)
}
mtext("Train Theta: GP Residual Mean vs Observed Residual Score", outer = TRUE, cex = 1.1, font = 2)

# --- Plot 2b: Held-out residual score
par(mfrow = c(3, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 3, 0))
for (pc_idx in 1:min(6, M_components)) {
  col_name  <- paste0("PC", pc_idx)
  test_true <- test_scores[, col_name]
  test_pred <- pred_test_df[[col_name]]

  r2   <- if (var(test_true) > 1e-10 && var(test_pred) > 1e-10)
              cor(test_true, test_pred)^2 else 0
  rmse <- sqrt(mean((test_true - test_pred)^2))
  fit  <- lm(test_pred ~ test_true)

  plot_range <- range(c(test_true, test_pred))
  plot(test_true, test_pred, pch = 19, col = "tomato", cex = 1.2,
       xlim = plot_range, ylim = plot_range,
       main = paste0(col_name, " | R\u00b2=", round(r2, 3), " | RMSE=", round(rmse, 3)),
       xlab = "Observed Residual Score (held-out theta)", ylab = "GP Residual Mean")
  abline(0, 1, col = "red", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
  abline(fit, col = "darkgreen", lwd = 1.5)
  legend("topleft", c("1:1 line", "OLS fit"),
         col = c("red", "darkgreen"), lty = c(2, 1), lwd = c(2, 1.5), cex = 0.7)
}
mtext("Held-Out Theta: GP Residual Mean vs Observed Residual Score", outer = TRUE, cex = 1.1, font = 2)

# --- Plot 3: Residuals vs Theta (Test Set) ---
par(mfrow = c(3, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1))

for (pc_idx in 1:min(6, M_components)) {
  col_name  <- paste0("PC", pc_idx)
  test_true <- test_scores[, col_name]
  test_pred <- pred_test_df[[col_name]]
  residuals <- test_true - test_pred
  
  plot(test_theta_raw, residuals, pch = 16, col = "darkorange", cex = 0.8,
       main = paste0(col_name, " Residuals"),
       xlab = expression(theta), ylab = "Residual (Observed - Predicted)")
  abline(h = 0, col = "black", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
  
  # Add loess smoother to detect systematic bias
  if (length(residuals) > 10) {
    lo <- loess(residuals ~ test_theta_raw, span = 0.5)
    x_sorted <- sort(test_theta_raw)
    lines(x_sorted, predict(lo, newdata = data.frame(test_theta_raw = x_sorted)),
          col = "purple", lwd = 2)
  }
  
  legend("topright", c("Residuals", "Zero", "Trend (loess)"),
         pch = c(16, NA, NA), lty = c(NA, 2, 1),
         col = c("darkorange", "black", "purple"),
         lwd = c(NA, 2, 2), cex = 0.65)
}

# --- Plot 4: Summary Statistics ---
par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1))

# Compute R^2 and RMSE for all PCs
test_r2 <- sapply(1:M_components, function(pc_idx) {
  col_name <- paste0("PC", pc_idx)
  test_true <- test_scores[, col_name]
  test_pred <- pred_test_df[[col_name]]
  if (var(test_true) > 1e-10 && var(test_pred) > 1e-10) cor(test_true, test_pred)^2 else 0
})

test_rmse <- sapply(1:M_components, function(pc_idx) {
  col_name <- paste0("PC", pc_idx)
  test_true <- test_scores[, col_name]
  test_pred <- pred_test_df[[col_name]]
  sqrt(mean((test_true - test_pred)^2))
})

# Bar plot: R^2 by PC
barplot(test_r2, names.arg = paste0("PC", 1:M_components),
        col = ifelse(test_r2 > 0.9, "darkgreen", 
                     ifelse(test_r2 > 0.7, "steelblue", "coral")),
        main = "Test Set R^2 by PC",
        ylab = "R^2", las = 2, cex.names = 0.7, ylim = c(0, 1))
abline(h = 0.9, col = "darkgreen", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
abline(h = 0.7, col = "steelblue", lty = 2, lwd = 1)
legend("bottomleft", c("R^2 > 0.9 (Excellent)", "R^2 > 0.7 (Good)", "R^2 <= 0.7 (Poor)"),
       fill = c("darkgreen", "steelblue", "coral"), cex = 0.7)

# Bar plot: Lengthscale by PC
all_lengthscales <- sapply(gp_models, function(m) m$lengthscale)
barplot(all_lengthscales, names.arg = paste0("PC", 1:M_components),
        col = "mediumpurple",
        main = "Optimized Lengthscale by PC",
        ylab = "Lengthscale (warped space)", las = 2, cex.names = 0.7)
abline(h = MIN_LS, col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
text(M_components/2, MIN_LS + 0.02, paste("MIN_LS =", MIN_LS), col = "red", cex = 0.8)

# --- Print Summary Statistics ---
cat("\n--- GP PERFORMANCE SUMMARY (TEST SET) ---\n")
cat(sprintf("%-6s %8s %10s %12s\n", "PC", "R^2", "RMSE", "Lengthscale"))
cat(paste(rep("-", 40), collapse = ""), "\n")
for (pc_idx in 1:M_components) {
  cat(sprintf("PC%-4d %8.4f %10.4f %12.4f\n",
              pc_idx, test_r2[pc_idx], test_rmse[pc_idx], all_lengthscales[pc_idx]))
}
cat(paste(rep("-", 40), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat(sprintf("%-6s %8.4f %10.4f %12.4f\n", 
            "MEAN", mean(test_r2), mean(test_rmse), mean(all_lengthscales)))
cat("\n")

# Check for PCs hitting the lengthscale floor
n_at_floor <- sum(all_lengthscales < MIN_LS * 1.1)
if (n_at_floor > 0) {
  cat("[INFO]", n_at_floor, "PCs have lengthscale near MIN_LS =", MIN_LS, "\n")
  cat("  Gaussian NLL optimizer consistently prefers short LS (tight training fit).\n")
  cat("  MIN_LS=", MIN_LS, "is intentionally set to the inter-sigma trend scale.\n")
  cat("  If test ISE is still >= Naive, consider raising MIN_LS further (e.g. 0.50).\n")
} else {
  cat("[OK] Lengthscales above MIN_LS floor")
}

cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

# ==============================================================================
# DIRECT GRID RECONSTRUCTION
# ==============================================================================
# Reconstruction decodes directly from MFPCA scores to the raw X/Y/Z grids.
# Prediction geometry vectors are NA placeholders because the reconstruction
# function ignores geometry arguments.
# ==============================================================================
n_test_pk <- length(test_theta_vals)
pred_peak_x_test <- pred_peak_z_test <- pred_width_x_test <- pred_width_z_test <-
  pred_left_width_x_test <- pred_right_width_x_test <-
  pred_left_width_z_test <- pred_right_width_z_test <-
  pred_height_x_test <- pred_height_z_test <- rep(NA_real_, n_test_pk)

mean_train_peak_x_loc <- mean_train_peak_z_loc <-
  mean_train_peak_x_width <- mean_train_peak_z_width <-
  mean_train_peak_x_left_width <- mean_train_peak_x_right_width <-
  mean_train_peak_z_left_width <- mean_train_peak_z_right_width <- NA_real_

cat("Reconstructing directly on raw grids.\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

# ==============================================================================
# --- Plot 5: Held-out theta-level R^2 along the full theta grid ---
binned_r2     <- numeric(M_components)
emp_mean_list <- vector("list", M_components)
gp_mean_list  <- vector("list", M_components)

for (pc_idx in 1:M_components) {
  col_name <- paste0("PC", pc_idx)
  model    <- gp_models[[pc_idx]]

  # One observed score vector exists at each theta, so no averaging is needed.
  emp_means <- ufpca_scores_smoothed[[col_name]]

  # Final score prediction at each theta on the full grid: LOESS trend + GP residual.
  gp_resid_means <- get_gp_predictions(model, (theta_list - x_center) / x_scale, return_var = FALSE)
  loess_trend_all <- predict_loess_trend(loess_models[[pc_idx]], theta_list)
  gp_means <- gp_resid_means + loess_trend_all

  emp_mean_list[[pc_idx]] <- emp_means
  gp_mean_list[[pc_idx]]  <- gp_means

  binned_r2[pc_idx] <- if (var(emp_means) > 1e-10 && var(gp_means) > 1e-10)
    cor(emp_means, gp_means)^2 else 0
}

# Barplot + scatter comparison
par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1))

# NOTE: This metric compares against the LOESS trend, not raw scores. It is
# misleading for residual GPs because Var(GP residual) inflates the y-axis
# spread. The corrected diagnostics below use raw observed scores.
barplot(binned_r2,
        names.arg = paste0("PC", 1:M_components),
        col = ifelse(binned_r2 > 0.9, "darkgreen",
                     ifelse(binned_r2 > 0.7, "steelblue", "coral")),
        main = "[Legacy] Theta-grid R^2 vs LOESS trend",
        ylab = "R^2 (final GP mean vs LOESS trend)",
        las = 2, cex.names = 0.7, ylim = c(0, 1))
abline(h = 0.9, col = "darkgreen", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
abline(h = 0.7, col = "steelblue", lty = 2, lwd = 1)
legend("bottomleft",
       c("R^2 > 0.9 (Excellent)", "R^2 > 0.7 (Good)", "R^2 <= 0.7 (Poor)"),
       fill = c("darkgreen", "steelblue", "coral"), cex = 0.7)

plot(test_r2, binned_r2, pch = 19, col = "steelblue",
     xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1),
     xlab = "Individual residual R^2 (test set)",
     ylab = "Theta-grid final-score R^2",
     main = "Individual residual vs Theta-grid final-score R^2")
abline(0, 1, col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
text(test_r2, binned_r2, labels = paste0("PC", 1:M_components),
     pos = 3, cex = 0.5, col = "grey30")
legend("topleft", "1:1 line", col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2, cex = 0.8)

# Residual-GP scatter: GP residual prediction vs observed residual at test theta
par(mfrow = c(3, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 3, 0))
resid_r2_test <- numeric(M_components)
for (pc_idx in 1:min(6, M_components)) {
  col <- paste0("PC", pc_idx)
  obs_res  <- as.numeric(test_scores[[col]])     # raw - LOESS at test theta
  pred_res <- pred_test_df[[col]]                # GP residual mean at test theta
  r2 <- if (var(obs_res) > 1e-10) cor(obs_res, pred_res)^2 else 0
  resid_r2_test[pc_idx] <- r2
  pr <- range(c(obs_res, pred_res), na.rm = TRUE)
  plot(obs_res, pred_res, pch = 19, col = "steelblue",
       xlim = pr, ylim = pr,
       main = sprintf("PC%d residual | R^2=%.3f", pc_idx, r2),
       xlab = "Observed residual (raw - LOESS)",
       ylab = "GP residual mean")
  abline(0, 1, col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
  abline(lm(pred_res ~ obs_res), col = "darkgreen", lwd = 1.5)
  legend("topleft", c("1:1 line", "OLS fit"),
         col = c("red", "darkgreen"), lty = c(2, 1), lwd = c(2, 1.5), cex = 0.7)
}
mtext("Residual-GP fit on held-out theta (PC1-6)", outer = TRUE, cex = 1.1, font = 2)
if (M_components > 6) {
  for (pc_idx in 7:M_components) {
    col <- paste0("PC", pc_idx)
    obs_res <- as.numeric(test_scores[[col]])
    pred_res <- pred_test_df[[col]]
    resid_r2_test[pc_idx] <- if (var(obs_res) > 1e-10) cor(obs_res, pred_res)^2 else 0
  }
}

# Final-score scatter: LOESS + GP residual vs raw observed score at test theta
par(mfrow = c(3, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 3, 0))
final_r2_test <- numeric(M_components)
for (pc_idx in 1:min(6, M_components)) {
  col <- paste0("PC", pc_idx)
  obs_raw    <- as.numeric(test_scores_raw[[col]])  # raw observed score at test theta
  pred_final <- final_pred_test_df[[col]]           # LOESS trend + GP residual
  r2 <- if (var(obs_raw) > 1e-10) cor(obs_raw, pred_final)^2 else 0
  final_r2_test[pc_idx] <- r2
  pr <- range(c(obs_raw, pred_final), na.rm = TRUE)
  plot(obs_raw, pred_final, pch = 19, col = "steelblue",
       xlim = pr, ylim = pr,
       main = sprintf("PC%d final | R^2=%.3f", pc_idx, r2),
       xlab = "Raw observed score",
       ylab = "LOESS + GP residual")
  abline(0, 1, col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
  abline(lm(pred_final ~ obs_raw), col = "darkgreen", lwd = 1.5)
  legend("topleft", c("1:1 line", "OLS fit"),
         col = c("red", "darkgreen"), lty = c(2, 1), lwd = c(2, 1.5), cex = 0.7)
}
mtext("Final-score fit on held-out theta (PC1-6)", outer = TRUE, cex = 1.1, font = 2)
if (M_components > 6) {
  for (pc_idx in 7:M_components) {
    col <- paste0("PC", pc_idx)
    obs_raw <- as.numeric(test_scores_raw[[col]])
    pred_final <- final_pred_test_df[[col]]
    final_r2_test[pc_idx] <- if (var(obs_raw) > 1e-10) cor(obs_raw, pred_final)^2 else 0
  }
}

cat("\n--- HELD-OUT R^2 SUMMARY (corrected diagnostics) ---\n")
cat(sprintf("%-6s %16s %16s\n", "PC", "Residual R^2", "Final R^2"))
cat(paste(rep("-", 40), collapse = ""), "\n")
for (pc_idx in 1:M_components) {
  cat(sprintf("PC%-4d %16.4f %16.4f\n",
              pc_idx, resid_r2_test[pc_idx], final_r2_test[pc_idx]))
}
cat(paste(rep("-", 40), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat(sprintf("%-6s %16.4f %16.4f\n", "MEAN",
            mean(resid_r2_test), mean(final_r2_test)))
cat("\n")

# Print table
cat("\n--- THETA-GRID FINAL-SCORE R^2 SUMMARY ---\n")
cat("(Final score predictions vs LOESS-smoothed theta-level trend scores)\n")
cat(sprintf("%-6s %14s %14s\n", "PC", "Individual R^2", "Held-out R^2"))
cat(paste(rep("-", 36), collapse = ""), "\n")
for (pc_idx in 1:M_components) {
  cat(sprintf("PC%-4d %14.4f %14.4f\n",
              pc_idx, test_r2[pc_idx], binned_r2[pc_idx]))
}
cat(paste(rep("-", 36), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat(sprintf("%-6s %14.4f %14.4f\n", "MEAN", mean(test_r2), mean(binned_r2)))
cat("\n")

```



```{r}

# ==============================================================================
# COVERAGE PROBABILITY ANALYSIS
# ==============================================================================
# Coverage probability measures how well the GP uncertainty is calibrated.
# For a 95% confidence interval, we expect ~95% of test points to fall within.
#
# If coverage << 95%: GP is OVERCONFIDENT (uncertainty too narrow)
# If coverage >> 95%: GP is UNDERCONFIDENT (uncertainty too wide)
# If coverage ~ 95%: GP uncertainty is well-calibrated!
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n--- COVERAGE PROBABILITY ANALYSIS (Residual GP Test Set) ---\n")
cat("Using Option A residual GP: interval variance = GP posterior var only\n\n")

# Compute coverage for different confidence levels
confidence_levels <- c(0.50, 0.80, 0.90, 0.95, 0.99)

# Storage for coverage results
coverage_by_pc <- matrix(NA, nrow = M_components, ncol = length(confidence_levels))
colnames(coverage_by_pc) <- paste0(confidence_levels * 100, "%")
rownames(coverage_by_pc) <- paste0("PC", 1:M_components)

# get_gp_predictions() is defined in the visualization chunk above (section 6b)

for (pc_idx in 1:M_components) {
  col_name <- paste0("PC", pc_idx)
  model <- gp_models[[pc_idx]]
  
  # Get predictions with variance for test set.
  pred_test_with_var <- get_gp_predictions(model, test_theta_norm, return_var = TRUE)
  
  test_true <- test_scores[, col_name]
  test_pred <- pred_test_with_var$mean
  # Residual-GP posterior variance only; no post-hoc residual variance is added.
  score_var <- pred_test_with_var$var_gp
  test_sd <- sqrt(pmax(score_var, 1e-10))
  
  # Compute coverage for each confidence level
  for (j in seq_along(confidence_levels)) {
    alpha <- 1 - confidence_levels[j]
    z_crit <- qnorm(1 - alpha/2)
    
    # Check if true value falls within [pred - z*sd, pred + z*sd]
    lower <- test_pred - z_crit * test_sd
    upper <- test_pred + z_crit * test_sd
    
    in_interval <- (test_true >= lower) & (test_true <= upper)
    coverage_by_pc[pc_idx, j] <- mean(in_interval) * 100
  }
}

# Print coverage table
cat(sprintf("\n%-6s", "PC"))
for (cl in confidence_levels) {
  cat(sprintf(" %6s", paste0(cl*100, "%")))
}
cat("\n")
cat(paste(rep("-", 6 + 7*length(confidence_levels)), collapse = ""), "\n")
```
