```{r}
for (pc_idx in 1:M_components) {
  cat(sprintf("PC%-4d", pc_idx))
  for (j in seq_along(confidence_levels)) {
    cov <- coverage_by_pc[pc_idx, j]
    cat(sprintf(" %5.1f%%", cov))
  }
  cat("\n")
}

cat(paste(rep("-", 6 + 7*length(confidence_levels)), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat(sprintf("%-6s", "MEAN"))
for (j in seq_along(confidence_levels)) {
  cat(sprintf(" %5.1f%%", mean(coverage_by_pc[, j])))
}
cat("\n")

cat(sprintf("%-6s", "TARGET"))
for (cl in confidence_levels) {
  cat(sprintf(" %5.1f%%", cl * 100))
}
cat("\n\n")

# Overall assessment
mean_95_coverage <- mean(coverage_by_pc[, "95%"])
if (abs(mean_95_coverage - 95) < 5) {
  cat("[OK] 95% CI coverage is well-calibrated (", round(mean_95_coverage, 1), "% vs target 95%)\n")
} else if (mean_95_coverage < 95) {
  cat("[WARNING] GP is OVERCONFIDENT: 95% CI coverage =", round(mean_95_coverage, 1), 
      "% (target: 95%)\n")
  cat("  Uncertainty bands are too narrow. Consider:\n")
  cat("  - Checking whether residual-GP posterior variance is underestimated\n")
  cat("  - Verifying var_gp is in the original residual-score scale\n")
} else {
  cat("[INFO] GP is slightly UNDERCONFIDENT: 95% CI coverage =", round(mean_95_coverage, 1), 
      "% (target: 95%)\n")
  cat("  Uncertainty bands are wider than necessary (conservative).\n")
}

# Visualization: Coverage probability plot
par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1))

# Plot 1: Coverage by PC for 95% CI
barplot(coverage_by_pc[, "95%"], names.arg = paste0("PC", 1:M_components),
        col = ifelse(abs(coverage_by_pc[, "95%"] - 95) < 10, "steelblue", "coral"),
        main = "95% CI Coverage by PC",
        ylab = "Coverage (%)", las = 2, cex.names = 0.7,
        ylim = c(0, 100))
abline(h = 95, col = "red", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
abline(h = c(85, 100), col = "orange", lwd = 1, lty = 3)
legend("bottomleft", c("Target (95%)", "Acceptable range"),
       col = c("red", "orange"), lty = c(2, 3), lwd = c(2, 1), cex = 0.7)

# Plot 2: Calibration curve (coverage vs nominal)
mean_coverage <- colMeans(coverage_by_pc)
plot(confidence_levels * 100, mean_coverage, type = "b", pch = 19, col = "blue", lwd = 2,
     main = "GP Calibration Curve",
     xlab = "Nominal Coverage (%)", ylab = "Empirical Coverage (%)",
     xlim = c(40, 100), ylim = c(40, 100))
abline(0, 1, col = "red", lwd = 2, lty = 2)  # Perfect calibration line
legend("topleft", c("Observed", "Perfect calibration"),
       pch = c(19, NA), lty = c(1, 2), col = c("blue", "red"), lwd = 2, cex = 0.8)

cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

```




```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# 7. RECONSTRUCTION (INVERSE SQUARE-ROOT MAP) & EVALUATION
# ==============================================================================

# Inverse square-root density transform.
inv_clr_transform <- function(sqrt_vec, grid) {
  sqrt_vec <- pmax(as.numeric(sqrt_vec), 0)
  dens_raw <- sqrt_vec^2
  delta <- diff(range(grid)) / (length(grid) - 1)
  mass <- sum(dens_raw) * delta
  if (!is.finite(mass) || mass <= 0) {
    dens_raw <- rep(1 / diff(range(grid)), length(grid))
    mass <- sum(dens_raw) * delta
  }
  dens_raw / mass
}

# Extract mean functions and eigenfunctions
mu_x <- as.vector(mfpca_fit$meanFunction[[1]]@X)
mu_y <- as.vector(mfpca_fit$meanFunction[[2]]@X)
mu_z <- as.vector(mfpca_fit$meanFunction[[3]]@X)

phi_x <- mfpca_fit$functions[[1]]@X
phi_y <- mfpca_fit$functions[[2]]@X
phi_z <- mfpca_fit$functions[[3]]@X

# Create mapping from theta to row index in density matrices
sigma_to_idx <- setNames(1:length(sigma_list), as.character(round(sigma_list, 6)))

# --- Function to reconstruct densities from scores ---
reconstruct_densities <- function(scores_mat, mu_x, mu_y, mu_z, phi_x, phi_y, phi_z,
                                   x_grid, y_grid, z_grid,
                                   x_peak_loc = NULL, x_peak_width = NULL,
                                   z_peak_loc = NULL, z_peak_width = NULL,
                                   x_peak_left_width = NULL, x_peak_right_width = NULL,
                                   z_peak_left_width = NULL, z_peak_right_width = NULL) {
  n <- nrow(scores_mat)
  
  # Square-root density reconstructions
  recon_clr_x <- sweep(scores_mat %*% phi_x, 2, mu_x, "+")
  recon_clr_y <- sweep(scores_mat %*% phi_y, 2, mu_y, "+")
  recon_clr_z <- sweep(scores_mat %*% phi_z, 2, mu_z, "+")
  
  # Convert directly to densities on the original grids. Geometry arguments are
  # accepted for compatibility and ignored.
  dens_x <- t(apply(recon_clr_x, 1, inv_clr_transform, grid = x_grid))
  dens_y <- t(apply(recon_clr_y, 1, inv_clr_transform, grid = y_grid))
  dens_z <- t(apply(recon_clr_z, 1, inv_clr_transform, grid = z_grid))
  
  list(x = dens_x, y = dens_y, z = dens_z)
}

# Reconstruct for Test Set using final Option A scores:
# Fixed-span LOESS trend + residual-GP posterior mean (one row per test theta).
scores_pred_test <- as.matrix(final_pred_test_df[, pc_cols, drop = FALSE])
recon_test <- reconstruct_densities(scores_pred_test, mu_x, mu_y, mu_z,
                                     phi_x, phi_y, phi_z, x_grid, y_grid, z_grid,
                                     x_peak_loc = pred_peak_x_test,
                                     x_peak_width = pred_width_x_test,
                                     x_peak_left_width = pred_left_width_x_test,
                                     x_peak_right_width = pred_right_width_x_test,
                                     z_peak_loc = pred_peak_z_test,
                                     z_peak_width = pred_width_z_test,
                                     z_peak_left_width = pred_left_width_z_test,
                                     z_peak_right_width = pred_right_width_z_test)

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
# NOTE: Post-hoc peak shift correction was trialled but removed because
# shift_density_to_peak() worsened ISE for multimodal X and Z
# (shifting the dominant peak misplaces secondary resonance peaks and loses density
# at grid boundaries). Option B variance inflation is retained instead.

# Naive baseline: MFPCA reconstruction from the average training PC score vector.
# This uses the same decoder as the GP approach; only the latent score input differs.
# GP uses theta-specific final predicted scores, while the naive baseline reuses one
# training-average score vector for every held-out theta.
mean_train_scores_vec <- colMeans(train_scores_smoothed)    # training-average trend score per PC
mean_train_scores_mat <- matrix(mean_train_scores_vec, nrow = 1)  # 1 x M matrix
recon_naive           <- reconstruct_densities(mean_train_scores_mat,
                                               mu_x, mu_y, mu_z,
                                               phi_x, phi_y, phi_z,
                                               x_grid, y_grid, z_grid,
                                               x_peak_loc = mean_train_peak_x_loc,
                                               x_peak_width = mean_train_peak_x_width,
                                               x_peak_left_width = mean_train_peak_x_left_width,
                                               x_peak_right_width = mean_train_peak_x_right_width,
                                               z_peak_loc = mean_train_peak_z_loc,
                                               z_peak_width = mean_train_peak_z_width,
                                               z_peak_left_width = mean_train_peak_z_left_width,
                                               z_peak_right_width = mean_train_peak_z_right_width)
mean_train_dens_x <- as.vector(recon_naive$x)
mean_train_dens_y <- as.vector(recon_naive$y)
mean_train_dens_z <- as.vector(recon_naive$z)

# ==============================================================================
# 8. EVALUATION METRICS
# ==============================================================================

# Integrated Squared Error
compute_ISE <- function(f1, f2, grid) {
  delta <- diff(range(grid)) / (length(grid) - 1)
  sum((f1 - f2)^2) * delta
}

compute_hellinger <- function(f1, f2, grid) {
  delta <- diff(range(grid)) / (length(grid) - 1)
  sqrt(0.5 * sum((sqrt(pmax(f1, 0)) - sqrt(pmax(f2, 0)))^2) * delta)
}

# Basis characterisation only: reconstruction ISE is retained for Table 3 and
# the three-stage reconstruction figure. It is not used as a primary
# density-space validation metric for the emulator.
n_test_s <- length(test_theta_vals)

# Mean-only density evaluation: posterior mean reconstruction only.
gp_mean_ise_x <- gp_mean_ise_y <- gp_mean_ise_z <- numeric(n_test_s)
naive_mean_ise_x <- naive_mean_ise_y <- naive_mean_ise_z <- numeric(n_test_s)
gp_mean_hell_x <- gp_mean_hell_y <- gp_mean_hell_z <- numeric(n_test_s)
naive_mean_hell_x <- naive_mean_hell_y <- naive_mean_hell_z <- numeric(n_test_s)

for (i in seq_len(n_test_s)) {
  ref_row <- test_theta_idx[i]
  gp_mean_ise_x[i] <- compute_ISE(recon_test$x[i, ], dens_mat_x[ref_row, ], x_grid)
  gp_mean_ise_y[i] <- compute_ISE(recon_test$y[i, ], dens_mat_y[ref_row, ], y_grid)
  gp_mean_ise_z[i] <- compute_ISE(recon_test$z[i, ], dens_mat_z[ref_row, ], z_grid)
  gp_mean_hell_x[i] <- compute_hellinger(recon_test$x[i, ], dens_mat_x[ref_row, ], x_grid)
  gp_mean_hell_y[i] <- compute_hellinger(recon_test$y[i, ], dens_mat_y[ref_row, ], y_grid)
  gp_mean_hell_z[i] <- compute_hellinger(recon_test$z[i, ], dens_mat_z[ref_row, ], z_grid)

  naive_mean_ise_x[i] <- compute_ISE(mean_train_dens_x, dens_mat_x[ref_row, ], x_grid)
  naive_mean_ise_y[i] <- compute_ISE(mean_train_dens_y, dens_mat_y[ref_row, ], y_grid)
  naive_mean_ise_z[i] <- compute_ISE(mean_train_dens_z, dens_mat_z[ref_row, ], z_grid)
  naive_mean_hell_x[i] <- compute_hellinger(mean_train_dens_x, dens_mat_x[ref_row, ], x_grid)
  naive_mean_hell_y[i] <- compute_hellinger(mean_train_dens_y, dens_mat_y[ref_row, ], y_grid)
  naive_mean_hell_z[i] <- compute_hellinger(mean_train_dens_z, dens_mat_z[ref_row, ], z_grid)
}

gp_mean_l2_x <- sqrt(gp_mean_ise_x)
gp_mean_l2_y <- sqrt(gp_mean_ise_y)
gp_mean_l2_z <- sqrt(gp_mean_ise_z)
naive_mean_l2_x <- sqrt(naive_mean_ise_x)
naive_mean_l2_y <- sqrt(naive_mean_ise_y)
naive_mean_l2_z <- sqrt(naive_mean_ise_z)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Diagnostic: GP score error vs the MFPCA reconstruction floor.
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
mfpca_test_ise_x <- ise_mfpca_x[test_theta_idx]
mfpca_test_ise_y <- ise_mfpca_y[test_theta_idx]
mfpca_test_ise_z <- ise_mfpca_z[test_theta_idx]

gp_mfpca_decomp <- data.frame(
  Stage = c("MFPCA true scores",
            "GP scores",
            "Naive baseline"),
  X_ISE = c(mean(mfpca_test_ise_x),
            mean(gp_mean_ise_x),
            mean(naive_mean_ise_x)),
  Y_ISE = c(mean(mfpca_test_ise_y),
            mean(gp_mean_ise_y),
            mean(naive_mean_ise_y)),
  Z_ISE = c(mean(mfpca_test_ise_z),
            mean(gp_mean_ise_z),
            mean(naive_mean_ise_z)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

cat("\nGP vs MFPCA error decomposition (held-out test set)\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-30s  %10s  %10s  %10s\n", "Stage", "X ISE", "Y ISE", "Z ISE"))
cat(paste(rep("-", 68), collapse = ""), "\n")
for (i in seq_len(nrow(gp_mfpca_decomp))) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-30s  %10.4f  %10.4f  %10.4f\n",
              gp_mfpca_decomp$Stage[i],
              gp_mfpca_decomp$X_ISE[i],
              gp_mfpca_decomp$Y_ISE[i],
              gp_mfpca_decomp$Z_ISE[i]))
}
cat(paste(rep("-", 68), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat(sprintf("  GP score uplift over MFPCA floor: X %+0.4f  Y %+0.4f  Z %+0.4f\n\n",
            mean(gp_mean_ise_x) - mean(mfpca_test_ise_x),
            mean(gp_mean_ise_y) - mean(mfpca_test_ise_y),
            mean(gp_mean_ise_z) - mean(mfpca_test_ise_z)))

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Diagnostic: between-theta variance ratio in density space
# Small ratios indicate the density barely changes with theta, so the GP should
# learn a nearly flat conditional-mean surface.
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
density_var_ratio <- data.frame(
  Variable = c("X", "Y", "Z"),
  between_var = c(
    mean(rowSums(sweep(dens_mat_x, 2, colMeans(dens_mat_x))^2) * (diff(range(x_grid)) / (length(x_grid) - 1))),
    mean(rowSums(sweep(dens_mat_y, 2, colMeans(dens_mat_y))^2) * (diff(range(y_grid)) / (length(y_grid) - 1))),
    mean(rowSums(sweep(dens_mat_z, 2, colMeans(dens_mat_z))^2) * (diff(range(z_grid)) / (length(z_grid) - 1)))
  ),
  total_var = c(
    mean(apply(dens_mat_x, 1, var)),
    mean(apply(dens_mat_y, 1, var)),
    mean(apply(dens_mat_z, 1, var))
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
density_var_ratio$ratio <- density_var_ratio$between_var / pmax(density_var_ratio$total_var, 1e-10)

cat("Between-theta / total density variance ratio\n")
cat(sprintf("  X = %.3f   Y = %.3f   Z = %.3f\n\n",
            density_var_ratio$ratio[1], density_var_ratio$ratio[2], density_var_ratio$ratio[3]))

z_test_recon_diag <- data.frame(
  theta = test_theta_vals,
  mfpca_raw_ise = ise_z_raw_space[test_theta_idx],
  final_density_ise = ise_z_final_density[test_theta_idx],
  gp_mean_ise = gp_mean_ise_z,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
x_test_recon_diag <- data.frame(
  theta = test_theta_vals,
  mfpca_raw_ise = ise_x_raw_space[test_theta_idx],
  final_density_ise = ise_x_final_density[test_theta_idx],
  gp_mean_ise = gp_mean_ise_x,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Gaussian CRPS
# CRPS(N(mu, sigma^2), y) = sigma * [z*(2*Phi(z)-1) + 2*phi(z) - 1/sqrt(pi)]
# where z = (y - mu) / sigma.
# Reduces to |y - mu| when sigma -> 0 (deterministic forecast).
# Always >= 0; smaller is better.
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
gaussian_crps <- function(y, mu, sd) {
  sd <- pmax(sd, 1e-10)
  z  <- (y - mu) / sd
  sd * (z * (2 * pnorm(z) - 1) + 2 * dnorm(z) - 1 / sqrt(pi))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Integrated CRPS in raw density space
# For each grid point x_j, the pointwise CRPS is:
#   CRPS_j = E|X - f_true(x_j)| - (1/2) E|X - X'|
# averaged over the ensemble {X_i = f_i(x_j)}.
#
# The pair-distance term uses the sorted-order-statistics identity, giving
# O(N log N) per grid point instead of O(N^2):
#   (1/N^2) sum_{i,j} |x_i - x_j|  =  (2/N^2) sum_i (2i - N - 1) * x_(i)
# where x_(i) are the sorted ensemble values.
#
# Final result: sum_j CRPS_j * grid_step  (units: same as ISE^{1/2})
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
crps_integrated_func <- function(ensemble, y_obs, grid_step) {
  n_samp <- nrow(ensemble)
  n_grid <- ncol(ensemble)
  y_mat  <- matrix(y_obs, nrow = n_samp, ncol = n_grid, byrow = TRUE)

  # Term 1: mean |X_i - y_obs| at each grid point  (vectorised)
  term1_vec <- colMeans(abs(ensemble - y_mat))

  # Term 2: mean pairwise |X_i - X_j| via order-statistics trick (O(N log N))
  term2_vec <- apply(ensemble, 2, function(x) {
    xs <- sort(x)
    n  <- length(xs)
    2 / n^2 * sum((2 * seq_len(n) - n - 1) * xs)
  })

  crps_vec <- term1_vec - 0.5 * term2_vec   # pointwise CRPS at each x_j
  sum(crps_vec) * grid_step                  # integrate over domain
}


# ==============================================================================
# Latent-space diagnostic metric: evaluates how accurately the residual GP
# predicts held-out residual PC scores at unseen theta values. This is not the primary
# density-space validation metric; iCRPS remains the main end-to-end criterion.
#
# For each held-out test theta and each PC component:
#   GP    predictive: N(GP residual mean, v_k)
#   Naive predictive: N(training-average residual, empirical residual variance)
#
# Both forecasts are Gaussian, so the closed-form Gaussian CRPS
# formula applies.  CRPS Skill Score = 1 - CRPS_GP / CRPS_Naive  (> 0 = GP wins)
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 70), collapse=""), "\n")
cat("Latent-space CRPS on held-out theta-level residual PC scores\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse=""), "\n")

# Collect GP posterior variance. Under Option A this is the score variance
# propagated through density space; no post-hoc sigma2_resid,k is added.
cat("Collecting GP posterior variances for residual scores...\n")
pred_test_var_mat <- matrix(0, nrow = n_test_s, ncol = M_components)
pred_test_latent_var_mat <- matrix(0, nrow = n_test_s, ncol = M_components)
pred_test_obs_var_mat <- matrix(0, nrow = n_test_s, ncol = M_components)
for (pc_idx in 1:M_components) {
  model    <- gp_models[[pc_idx]]
  pred_out <- get_gp_predictions(model, test_theta_norm, return_var = TRUE)
  if (is.null(pred_out$var_noise)) {
    pred_out$var_noise <- rep(0, n_test_s)
  }
  if (is.null(pred_out$var_gp)) {
    pred_out$var_gp <- pred_out$var
  }
  pred_test_latent_var_mat[, pc_idx] <- pred_out$var_gp
  pred_test_obs_var_mat[, pc_idx] <- rep(obs_noise_floor_k[pc_idx], n_test_s)
}
pred_test_total_var_mat <- pred_test_latent_var_mat
pred_test_var_mat <- pred_test_total_var_mat

draw_pc_samples <- function(gp_mu, score_var, n_samp) {
  total_sd <- sqrt(pmax(score_var, 1e-10))
  matrix(
    rnorm(n_samp * length(gp_mu),
          mean = rep(gp_mu, each = n_samp),
          sd   = rep(total_sd, each = n_samp)),
    nrow = n_samp, ncol = length(gp_mu)
  )
}

CAL_FACTOR <- 1.0

latent_share <- pred_test_latent_var_mat / pmax(pred_test_var_mat, 1e-10)
cat("Density-space calibration factor disabled:\n")
cat(sprintf("  Shared c = %.2f (no post-hoc test-set tuning)\n", CAL_FACTOR))
cat(sprintf("  Mean GP posterior variance share: %.1f%%  [range %.1f%%, %.1f%%]\n",
            100 * mean(latent_share),
            100 * min(latent_share),
            100 * max(latent_share)))
cat("  Propagated score variance: GP posterior v_k only\n")

# ==============================================================================
# PC-space variance diagnostic: size of learned posterior uncertainty relative to
# the residual-GP likelihood nugget floor.
# ==============================================================================

variance_ratio <- pred_test_latent_var_mat / pmax(pred_test_obs_var_mat, 1e-10)

cat(sprintf(
  "\nVariance diagnostic (v_k(theta*) / obs_noise_floor,k across %d components and test points):\n",
  M_components))
cat(sprintf("  Mean ratio = %.3f  (median %.3f, range [%.3f, %.3f])\n",
            mean(variance_ratio), median(variance_ratio),
            min(variance_ratio), max(variance_ratio)))

# Naive predictive parameters for density-space sampling (constant across test thetas)
naive_mean_vec <- mean_train_scores_vec                    # training-average trend score per PC
naive_var_vec  <- apply(train_scores_smoothed, 2, var)     # training trend-score variance per PC
naive_sd_vec   <- sqrt(pmax(naive_var_vec, 1e-10))

# Naive predictive parameters for latent residual CRPS
naive_resid_mean_vec <- colMeans(train_scores)
naive_resid_var_vec  <- apply(train_scores, 2, var)
naive_resid_sd_vec   <- sqrt(pmax(naive_resid_var_vec, 1e-10))

# Per-(test-theta, PC) Gaussian CRPS
crps_gp_mat    <- matrix(0, nrow = n_test_s, ncol = M_components)
crps_naive_mat <- matrix(0, nrow = n_test_s, ncol = M_components)

for (i in seq_len(n_test_s)) {
  for (k in seq_len(M_components)) {
    col_k <- paste0("PC", k)
    y_k   <- test_scores[i, col_k]

    # GP forecast
    mu_gp  <- pred_test_df[i, col_k]
    sd_gp  <- sqrt(max(pred_test_var_mat[i, k], 1e-10))
    crps_gp_mat[i, k] <- gaussian_crps(y_k, mu_gp, sd_gp)

    # Naive forecast
    crps_naive_mat[i, k] <- gaussian_crps(y_k, naive_resid_mean_vec[k], naive_resid_sd_vec[k])
  }
}

# Aggregate
mean_crps_gp_pc    <- colMeans(crps_gp_mat)
mean_crps_naive_pc <- colMeans(crps_naive_mat)
overall_crps_gp    <- mean(crps_gp_mat)
overall_crps_naive <- mean(crps_naive_mat)
crps_skill_pc      <- 1 - mean_crps_gp_pc / mean_crps_naive_pc

cat("\n  Overall mean CRPS in latent PC score space:\n")
cat(sprintf("  GP       : %.4f\n", overall_crps_gp))
cat(sprintf("  Naive    : %.4f\n", overall_crps_naive))
cat(sprintf("  CRPS Skill Score (1 - GP/Naive): %.4f  [> 0 means GP better]\n\n",
            1 - overall_crps_gp / overall_crps_naive))
cat("  Mean CRPS per PC (first 10 shown):\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-6s  %8s  %8s  %8s\n", "PC", "GP", "Naive", "Skill"))
cat(paste(rep("-", 38), collapse = ""), "\n")
for (k in seq_len(min(10, M_components))) {
  cat(sprintf("  PC%-3d   %8.4f  %8.4f  %+8.3f\n",
              k, mean_crps_gp_pc[k], mean_crps_naive_pc[k], crps_skill_pc[k]))
}
cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse=""), "\n\n")

# --- Plot: CRPS by PC ---
par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(5, 4, 4, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 3, 0))

# Left: mean CRPS per PC (side-by-side bars)
ylim_crps <- c(0, max(c(mean_crps_gp_pc, mean_crps_naive_pc)) * 1.1)
barplot(rbind(mean_crps_gp_pc, mean_crps_naive_pc),
        beside     = TRUE,
        col        = c("steelblue", "tomato"),
        names.arg  = paste0("PC", seq_len(M_components)),
        las        = 2, cex.names = 0.55,
        ylab       = "Mean CRPS (lower = better)",
        main       = "Mean CRPS per PC",
        ylim       = ylim_crps,
        legend.text = c("GP+MFPCA", "Naive (train mean)"),
        args.legend = list(x = "topright", bty = "n", cex = 0.8))

# Right: distribution of per-theta average CRPS (boxplot)
crps_gp_per_theta    <- rowMeans(crps_gp_mat)
crps_naive_per_theta <- rowMeans(crps_naive_mat)
boxplot(list("GP+MFPCA" = crps_gp_per_theta,
             "Naive\n(train avg)" = crps_naive_per_theta),
        col     = c("steelblue", "tomato"),
        ylab    = "Mean CRPS across all PCs",
        main    = "CRPS Distribution\nacross Test Theta Values",
        outline = FALSE)
stripchart(list(crps_gp_per_theta, crps_naive_per_theta),
           vertical = TRUE, method = "jitter", add = TRUE,
           pch = 16, cex = 0.5, col = rgb(0, 0, 0, 0.3))
abline(h = overall_crps_naive, col = "tomato",    lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
abline(h = overall_crps_gp,    col = "steelblue", lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
mtext("CRPS: GP Emulator vs Naive Baseline (PC Score Space)",
      outer = TRUE, cex = 1.1, font = 2)

# ==============================================================================
# Primary density-space validation metric for distribution prediction.
# iCRPS evaluates the full predictive ensemble in the original density space.
# A single score posterior is drawn per held-out theta and decoded into X, Y, Z.
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 70), collapse=""), "\n")
cat("Density-space evaluation from one shared PC-score posterior per theta\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse=""), "\n")

N_SAMP <- 100   # ensemble size for density-space evaluation
set.seed(123)

icrps_gp_x    <- icrps_naive_x    <- numeric(n_test_s)
icrps_gp_y    <- icrps_naive_y    <- numeric(n_test_s)
icrps_gp_z    <- icrps_naive_z    <- numeric(n_test_s)

dx <- diff(range(x_grid)) / (length(x_grid) - 1)
dy <- diff(range(y_grid)) / (length(y_grid) - 1)
dz <- diff(range(z_grid)) / (length(z_grid) - 1)

cat(sprintf("Drawing %d samples per test theta (%d total density reconstructions)...\n",
            N_SAMP, N_SAMP * n_test_s * 2))

for (i in seq_len(n_test_s)) {
  ref_row <- test_theta_idx[i]
  true_x  <- dens_mat_x[ref_row, ]
  true_y  <- dens_mat_y[ref_row, ]
  true_z  <- dens_mat_z[ref_row, ]

  gp_mu  <- as.numeric(final_pred_test_df[i, paste0("PC", seq_len(M_components))])
  gp_var <- pmax(pred_test_var_mat[i, ], 1e-10)
  gp_samples <- draw_pc_samples(gp_mu, gp_var, N_SAMP)

  # Naive samples: draws from N(grand_mean, diag(training_var))
  nav_samples <- matrix(
    rnorm(N_SAMP * M_components,
          mean = rep(naive_mean_vec, each = N_SAMP),
          sd   = rep(naive_sd_vec,   each = N_SAMP)),
    nrow = N_SAMP, ncol = M_components)

  # Reconstruct both ensembles to density space
  ens_gp  <- reconstruct_densities(gp_samples,  mu_x, mu_y, mu_z,
                                   phi_x, phi_y, phi_z, x_grid, y_grid, z_grid,
                                   x_peak_loc = rep(pred_peak_x_test[i], N_SAMP),
                                   x_peak_width = rep(pred_width_x_test[i], N_SAMP),
                                   x_peak_left_width = rep(pred_left_width_x_test[i], N_SAMP),
                                   x_peak_right_width = rep(pred_right_width_x_test[i], N_SAMP),
                                   z_peak_loc = rep(pred_peak_z_test[i], N_SAMP),
                                   z_peak_width = rep(pred_width_z_test[i], N_SAMP),
                                   z_peak_left_width = rep(pred_left_width_z_test[i], N_SAMP),
                                   z_peak_right_width = rep(pred_right_width_z_test[i], N_SAMP))
  ens_nav <- reconstruct_densities(nav_samples, mu_x, mu_y, mu_z,
                                   phi_x, phi_y, phi_z, x_grid, y_grid, z_grid,
                                   x_peak_loc = rep(mean_train_peak_x_loc, N_SAMP),
                                   x_peak_width = rep(mean_train_peak_x_width, N_SAMP),
                                   x_peak_left_width = rep(mean_train_peak_x_left_width, N_SAMP),
                                   x_peak_right_width = rep(mean_train_peak_x_right_width, N_SAMP),
                                   z_peak_loc = rep(mean_train_peak_z_loc, N_SAMP),
                                   z_peak_width = rep(mean_train_peak_z_width, N_SAMP),
                                   z_peak_left_width = rep(mean_train_peak_z_left_width, N_SAMP),
                                   z_peak_right_width = rep(mean_train_peak_z_right_width, N_SAMP))

  # (Peak-shift correction removed: worsens ISE for multimodal X and Z)

  # Integrated CRPS in raw density space
  icrps_gp_x[i]    <- crps_integrated_func(ens_gp$x,  true_x, dx)
  icrps_gp_y[i]    <- crps_integrated_func(ens_gp$y,  true_y, dy)
  icrps_gp_z[i]    <- crps_integrated_func(ens_gp$z,  true_z, dz)
  icrps_naive_x[i] <- crps_integrated_func(ens_nav$x, true_x, dx)
  icrps_naive_y[i] <- crps_integrated_func(ens_nav$y, true_y, dy)
  icrps_naive_z[i] <- crps_integrated_func(ens_nav$z, true_z, dz)

  if (i %% 5 == 0 || i == n_test_s)
    cat(sprintf("  test theta %d / %d done\n", i, n_test_s))
}

cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 70), collapse=""), "\n")
cat("Integrated CRPS summary in density space\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse=""), "\n")
cat("  iCRPS = integral_x CRPS(F_x, f_true(x)) dx   [units match sqrt(ISE)]\n\n")

cat(sprintf("  %-18s  %8s  %8s  %7s  %+7s\n",
            "Variable", "GP", "Naive", "Ratio", "Skill"))
cat(paste(rep("-", 58), collapse=""), "\n")
for (info in list(
      list(gp = icrps_gp_x, mp = icrps_naive_x, nm = "X (Log Period)"),
      list(gp = icrps_gp_y, mp = icrps_naive_y, nm = "Y (Log Duration)"),
      list(gp = icrps_gp_z, mp = icrps_naive_z, nm = "Z (Log Hill)"))) {
  ratio <- mean(info$gp) / mean(info$mp)
  skill <- 1 - ratio
  cat(sprintf("  %-18s  %8.4f  %8.4f  %7.3f  %+7.3f\n",
              info$nm, mean(info$gp), mean(info$mp), ratio, skill))
}
cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse=""), "\n\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Mean-only density evaluation
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("Mean-only density evaluation (posterior mean reconstruction only)\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-18s  %8s  %8s  %8s  %8s\n",
            "Variable", "GP ISE", "Naive ISE", "GP L2", "Naive L2"))
cat(paste(rep("-", 68), collapse = ""), "\n")
for (info in list(
      list(gp_ise = gp_mean_ise_x, nv_ise = naive_mean_ise_x, gp_l2 = gp_mean_l2_x, nv_l2 = naive_mean_l2_x, nm = "X (Log Period)"),
      list(gp_ise = gp_mean_ise_y, nv_ise = naive_mean_ise_y, gp_l2 = gp_mean_l2_y, nv_l2 = naive_mean_l2_y, nm = "Y (Log Duration)"),
      list(gp_ise = gp_mean_ise_z, nv_ise = naive_mean_ise_z, gp_l2 = gp_mean_l2_z, nv_l2 = naive_mean_l2_z, nm = "Z (Log Hill)"))) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-18s  %8.4f  %8.4f  %8.4f  %8.4f\n",
              info$nm, mean(info$gp_ise), mean(info$nv_ise),
              mean(info$gp_l2), mean(info$nv_l2)))
}
cat(paste(rep("=", 70), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

# --- Plot: Integrated CRPS boxplots (raw density space) ---
par(mfrow = c(1, 3), mar = c(5, 4, 3, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 3, 0))
for (info in list(
       list(gp = icrps_gp_x, mp = icrps_naive_x, nm = "Log Period"),
       list(gp = icrps_gp_y, mp = icrps_naive_y, nm = "Log Duration"),
       list(gp = icrps_gp_z, mp = icrps_naive_z, nm = "Log Hill Spacing"))) {
  boxplot(list("GP+MFPCA" = info$gp, "Naive\n(mean train)" = info$mp),
          col     = c("steelblue", "tomato"),
          main    = info$nm,
          ylab    = "Integrated CRPS (lower = better)",
          outline = FALSE)
  stripchart(list(info$gp, info$mp),
             vertical = TRUE, method = "jitter", add = TRUE,
             pch = 16, cex = 0.4, col = rgb(0, 0, 0, 0.25))
  legend("topright",
         legend = c(sprintf("GP  med=%.3f", median(info$gp)),
                    sprintf("Nai med=%.3f", median(info$mp))),
         col = c("steelblue", "tomato"), lty = 1, lwd = 2,
         bty = "n", cex = 0.8)
}
mtext("Integrated CRPS: GP Emulator vs Naive Baseline (Raw Density Space)",
      outer = TRUE, cex = 1.1, font = 2)

# ==============================================================================
# 9. POSTERIOR PREDICTIVE DISTRIBUTION AT HELD-OUT THETA VALUES
# ==============================================================================
# Goal: predict the full distribution of planetary statistics at new theta values.
#
# The GP emulator provides a Bayesian posterior over PC scores:
#   PC_k | theta_new, data  ~  N( mu_k(theta_new), sigma^2_k(theta_new) )
# Propagating this through the MFPCA inverse transform gives a posterior
# predictive distribution over density functions:
#   f(x) | theta_new, data  ~  MFPCA^{-1}( GP posterior samples )
#
# For each held-out theta we:
#   1. Draw N_POST samples from the GP posterior (epistemic uncertainty only)
#   2. Map each sample back to density space by squaring and normalizing
#   3. Compute pointwise posterior mean + 95% credible band
#   4. Measure density-level coverage: fraction of x-grid where truth is in band
# ==============================================================================

# --- Step 1: Draw posterior predictive density ensemble for all held-out thetas ---
N_POST  <- 500  # posterior draws per held-out theta for density bands
CI_PROB <- 0.95  # credible band probability
alpha   <- 1 - CI_PROB
set.seed(42)

cat(sprintf("\nDrawing %d posterior predictive samples for %d test theta values...\n",
            N_POST, n_test_s))

# Storage: list of per-theta ensembles (avoids large 3-D array)
post_ens <- vector("list", n_test_s)

for (i in seq_len(n_test_s)) {
  gp_mu <- as.numeric(final_pred_test_df[i, paste0("PC", seq_len(M_components))])
  gp_var <- pmax(pred_test_var_mat[i, ], 1e-10)
  pc_samp <- draw_pc_samples(gp_mu, gp_var, N_POST)

  ens <- reconstruct_densities(pc_samp, mu_x, mu_y, mu_z,
                               phi_x, phi_y, phi_z, x_grid, y_grid, z_grid,
                               x_peak_loc = rep(pred_peak_x_test[i], N_POST),
                               x_peak_width = rep(pred_width_x_test[i], N_POST),
                               x_peak_left_width = rep(pred_left_width_x_test[i], N_POST),
                               x_peak_right_width = rep(pred_right_width_x_test[i], N_POST),
                               z_peak_loc = rep(pred_peak_z_test[i], N_POST),
                               z_peak_width = rep(pred_width_z_test[i], N_POST),
                               z_peak_left_width = rep(pred_left_width_z_test[i], N_POST),
                               z_peak_right_width = rep(pred_right_width_z_test[i], N_POST))

  # (Peak-shift correction removed: worsens ISE for multimodal X and Z)

  # Pointwise posterior mean and credible band
  post_ens[[i]] <- list(
    # Pointwise posterior summaries for the reconstructed density ensemble.
    mean_x  = colMeans(ens$x),
    lower_x = apply(ens$x, 2, quantile, alpha / 2),
    upper_x = apply(ens$x, 2, quantile, 1 - alpha / 2),
    mean_y  = colMeans(ens$y),
    lower_y = apply(ens$y, 2, quantile, alpha / 2),
    upper_y = apply(ens$y, 2, quantile, 1 - alpha / 2),
    mean_z  = colMeans(ens$z),
    lower_z = apply(ens$z, 2, quantile, alpha / 2),
    upper_z = apply(ens$z, 2, quantile, 1 - alpha / 2)
  )
  if (i %% 5 == 0 || i == n_test_s)
    cat(sprintf("  theta %d / %d done\n", i, n_test_s))
}

# --- Step 2: Density-level coverage ---
# For each test theta: fraction of grid points where truth lies in the 95% band.
# This is the Bayesian analogue of interval coverage but in function space.
cov_x <- cov_y <- cov_z <- numeric(n_test_s)
for (i in seq_len(n_test_s)) {
  ref_row  <- test_theta_idx[i]
  pe       <- post_ens[[i]]
  cov_x[i] <- mean(dens_mat_x[ref_row, ] >= pe$lower_x &
                   dens_mat_x[ref_row, ] <= pe$upper_x)
  cov_y[i] <- mean(dens_mat_y[ref_row, ] >= pe$lower_y &
                   dens_mat_y[ref_row, ] <= pe$upper_y)
  cov_z[i] <- mean(dens_mat_z[ref_row, ] >= pe$lower_z &
                   dens_mat_z[ref_row, ] <= pe$upper_z)
}
cat(sprintf("\n%d%% Posterior Predictive Credible Band Coverage:\n", round(CI_PROB * 100)))
cat(sprintf("  Log Period:       mean=%.1f%%  median=%.1f%%\n",
            mean(cov_x)*100, median(cov_x)*100))
cat(sprintf("  Log Duration:     mean=%.1f%%  median=%.1f%%\n",
            mean(cov_y)*100, median(cov_y)*100))
cat(sprintf("  Log Hill Spacing: mean=%.1f%%  median=%.1f%%\n",
            mean(cov_z)*100, median(cov_z)*100))
cat("  (Ideal: coverage close to the nominal level at each observable.)\n")

# --- Step 3: Visualization ---
# Each held-out theta produces a 3-panel figure:
#   - Dark grey solid: KDE ground truth at that theta
#   - Dark orange dot-dash: MFPCA reconstruction using true held-out scores
#   - Purple dashed:   Naive baseline (MFPCA reconstruction from grand mean)
#   - Steelblue solid: GP posterior mean density
#   - Light blue band: 95% pointwise posterior predictive credible interval
#
plot_prediction_bayes <- function(i) {

  sigma_val <- round(test_theta_vals[i], 3)
  ref_row   <- test_theta_idx[i]
  pe        <- post_ens[[i]]

  # Colour palette
  col_truth <- "gray20"
  col_mfpca <- "#D95F02"
  col_naive <- "#7B6D8D"
  col_gp    <- "steelblue"
  col_band  <- rgb(0.27, 0.51, 0.71, 0.20)   # translucent steelblue

  par(mfrow = c(3, 1), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 3, 0))

  draw_panel <- function(grid, truth, mfpca, naive, gp_mean, lo, hi, xlab, cov_i) {
    yr <- range(c(truth, hi, mfpca, naive, gp_mean), na.rm = TRUE)
    yr[1] <- max(0, yr[1])

    plot(grid, truth, type = "l", col = col_truth, lwd = 3,
         xlab = xlab, ylab = "Density", ylim = yr, main = "")

    # 95% credible band (Bayesian posterior predictive)
    polygon(c(grid, rev(grid)), c(lo, rev(hi)),
            col = col_band, border = NA)

    lines(grid, mfpca,   col = col_mfpca, lwd = 2, lty = 3)
    lines(grid, naive,   col = col_naive, lwd = 2, lty = 2)
    lines(grid, gp_mean, col = col_gp,    lwd = 2)

    mtext(sprintf("%s  [band cov: %.0f%%]", xlab, cov_i * 100),
          side = 3, line = 0.3, cex = 0.85)

    legend("topright",
           c("KDE truth", "MFPCA recon", "Naive (mean train)",
             "GP posterior mean", sprintf("%.0f%% credible band", CI_PROB * 100)),
           col    = c(col_truth, col_mfpca, col_naive, col_gp, col_band),
           lwd    = c(3, 2, 2, 2, 8),
           lty    = c(1, 3, 2, 1, 1),
           cex    = 0.72, bg = "white", bty = "o")
  }

  draw_panel(x_grid,
             dens_mat_x[ref_row, ], recon_dens_x_true[ref_row, ], mean_train_dens_x,
             pe$mean_x, pe$lower_x, pe$upper_x,
             "Log Period Ratio", cov_x[i])

  draw_panel(y_grid,
             dens_mat_y[ref_row, ], recon_dens_y_true[ref_row, ], mean_train_dens_y,
             pe$mean_y, pe$lower_y, pe$upper_y,
             "Log Duration Ratio", cov_y[i])

  draw_panel(z_grid,
             dens_mat_z[ref_row, ], recon_dens_z_true[ref_row, ], mean_train_dens_z,
             pe$mean_z, pe$lower_z, pe$upper_z,
             "Log Hill Spacing", cov_z[i])

  mtext(bquote("Posterior Predictive Distribution at Held-Out" ~
               sigma[z] == .(sigma_val)),
        outer = TRUE, cex = 1.1, font = 2)
}

# Produce one 3-panel figure per held-out test theta
for (i in seq_along(test_theta_vals)) {
  plot_prediction_bayes(i)
}

# ==============================================================================
# Goal: the GP emulator maps theta -> f(x|theta), predicting the full density
# of planetary statistics rather than a scalar summary.
#
# Metric hierarchy:
#   1. iCRPS in density space (primary proper scoring rule)
#   2. Mean-only density reconstruction metrics
#   3. Posterior predictive coverage
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n\n")
cat(paste(rep("#", 70), collapse=""), "\n")
cat("DISTRIBUTION PREDICTION\n")
cat("Goal: GP emulator predicts f(x | theta_new) in density space.\n")
cat(paste(rep("#", 70), collapse=""), "\n\n")

cat("PRIMARY VALIDATION METRIC\n")
cat(paste(rep("-", 70), collapse=""), "\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8s  %8s  %8s  %8s\n",
            "Metric / Variable", "GP", "Naive", "Ratio", "Gain(%)"))
cat(paste(rep("-", 70), collapse=""), "\n")

for (info in list(
      list(gp = icrps_gp_x, mp = icrps_naive_x, nm = "iCRPS    X (Period)"),
      list(gp = icrps_gp_y, mp = icrps_naive_y, nm = "iCRPS    Y (Duration)"),
      list(gp = icrps_gp_z, mp = icrps_naive_z, nm = "iCRPS    Z (Hill)"))) {
  r <- mean(info$gp) / mean(info$mp)
  cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f  %8.4f  %8.3f  %+7.1f\n",
              info$nm, mean(info$gp), mean(info$mp), r, (1 - r) * 100))
}

# Posterior predictive density coverage (95% band)
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.1f%%  %8s  %8s  (target: 95%%)\n",
            "PPC band X (Period)",   mean(cov_x)*100, "\u2014", "\u2014"))
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.1f%%  %8s  %8s\n",
            "PPC band Y (Duration)", mean(cov_y)*100, "\u2014", "\u2014"))
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.1f%%  %8s  %8s\n",
            "PPC band Z (Hill)",     mean(cov_z)*100, "\u2014", "\u2014"))
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.2f  %8s  %8s\n",
            "Calibration c (fixed)", CAL_FACTOR, "\u2014", "\u2014"))

cat(paste(rep("-", 70), collapse=""), "\n\n")

cat("MEAN-ONLY DENSITY ERROR\n")
cat("  Posterior mean reconstruction only; uncertainty excluded.\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f  %8.4f\n", "ISE X: GP / Naive",
            mean(gp_mean_ise_x), mean(naive_mean_ise_x)))
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f  %8.4f\n", "ISE Y: GP / Naive",
            mean(gp_mean_ise_y), mean(naive_mean_ise_y)))
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f  %8.4f\n", "ISE Z: GP / Naive",
            mean(gp_mean_ise_z), mean(naive_mean_ise_z)))
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f  %8.4f\n", "Hel X: GP / Naive",
            mean(gp_mean_hell_x), mean(naive_mean_hell_x)))
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f  %8.4f\n", "Hel Y: GP / Naive",
            mean(gp_mean_hell_y), mean(naive_mean_hell_y)))
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f  %8.4f\n", "Hel Z: GP / Naive",
            mean(gp_mean_hell_z), mean(naive_mean_hell_z)))
cat(paste(rep("-", 70), collapse=""), "\n\n")

cat("BASIS CHARACTERISATION ONLY\n")
cat("  These values are computed with exact unpredicted scores and are not\n")
cat("  used as primary density-space validation metrics.\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f\n", "ISE floor X (Period)",   mean(ise_mfpca_x)))
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f\n", "ISE floor Y (Duration)", mean(ise_mfpca_y)))
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f\n", "ISE floor Z (Hill)",     mean(ise_mfpca_z)))
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f\n", "X raw-space ISE",       mean(ise_x_raw_space)))
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f\n", "X final density ISE",   mean(ise_x_final_density)))
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f\n", "Z raw-space ISE",       mean(ise_z_raw_space)))
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f\n", "Z final density ISE",   mean(ise_z_final_density)))
cat(paste(rep("-", 70), collapse=""), "\n\n")

cat("DIAGNOSTIC (latent PC space)\n")
cat(paste(rep("-", 70), collapse=""), "\n")
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f\n", "CRPS GP (PC space)",    overall_crps_gp))
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f\n", "CRPS Naive (PC space)", overall_crps_naive))
cat(sprintf("  %-22s  %8.4f\n", "CRPS Skill Score",
            1 - overall_crps_gp / overall_crps_naive))
cat(paste(rep("#", 70), collapse=""), "\n\n")

```

```{r x_reconstruction_diagnostic, fig.width=14, fig.height=10}
# ==============================================================================
# X reconstruction diagnostic
# Compare raw X, MFPCA true-score reconstruction, and GP mean reconstruction on
# held-out examples.
# ==============================================================================
cat("X reconstruction diagnostic (held-out test points)\n")
x_diag_ord <- order(x_test_recon_diag$gp_mean_ise, decreasing = TRUE)
x_diag_top <- x_test_recon_diag[x_diag_ord[seq_len(min(6, nrow(x_test_recon_diag)))], ]
print(x_diag_top)

sel_x_idx <- x_diag_ord[c(1, ceiling(length(x_diag_ord) / 2), length(x_diag_ord))]
sel_x_idx <- unique(sel_x_idx)

par(mfrow = c(length(sel_x_idx), 2), mar = c(3.5, 3.5, 2.5, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 3, 0))
for (ii in sel_x_idx) {
  ref_row <- test_theta_idx[ii]
  x_truth_raw <- dens_mat_x[ref_row, ]
  x_recon_mfpca <- recon_dens_x_true[ref_row, ]
  x_recon_final <- recon_test$x[ii, ]
  sigma_lab <- sprintf("theta=%.2f", test_theta_vals[ii])

  plot(x_grid, x_truth_raw, type = "l", lwd = 2.5, col = "black",
       main = sprintf("MFPCA true-score\n%s | ISE=%.4f",
                      sigma_lab, x_test_recon_diag$mfpca_raw_ise[ii]),
       xlab = "Log Period Ratio", ylab = "Density")
  lines(x_grid, x_recon_mfpca, col = "#D95F02", lwd = 2)

  plot(x_grid, x_truth_raw, type = "l", lwd = 2.5, col = "black",
       main = sprintf("GP mean\nISE=%.4f", x_test_recon_diag$gp_mean_ise[ii]),
       xlab = "Log Period Ratio", ylab = "Density")
  lines(x_grid, x_recon_final, col = "steelblue", lwd = 2)
}
mtext("X Diagnostic: raw KDE, MFPCA reconstruction, and GP reconstruction",
      outer = TRUE, cex = 1.1, font = 2)
```

```{r z_reconstruction_diagnostic, fig.width=14, fig.height=10}
# ==============================================================================
# Z reconstruction diagnostic
# Compare raw Z, MFPCA true-score reconstruction, and GP mean reconstruction on
# held-out examples.
# ==============================================================================
cat("Z reconstruction diagnostic (held-out test points)\n")
z_diag_ord <- order(z_test_recon_diag$gp_mean_ise, decreasing = TRUE)
z_diag_top <- z_test_recon_diag[z_diag_ord[seq_len(min(6, nrow(z_test_recon_diag)))], ]
print(z_diag_top)

sel_z_idx <- z_diag_ord[c(1, ceiling(length(z_diag_ord) / 2), length(z_diag_ord))]
sel_z_idx <- unique(sel_z_idx)

par(mfrow = c(length(sel_z_idx), 2), mar = c(3.5, 3.5, 2.5, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 3, 0))
for (ii in sel_z_idx) {
  ref_row <- test_theta_idx[ii]
  z_truth_raw <- dens_mat_z[ref_row, ]
  z_recon_mfpca <- recon_dens_z_true[ref_row, ]
  z_recon_final <- recon_test$z[ii, ]
  sigma_lab <- sprintf("theta=%.2f", test_theta_vals[ii])

  plot(z_grid, z_truth_raw, type = "l", lwd = 2.5, col = "black",
       main = sprintf("MFPCA true-score\n%s | ISE=%.4f",
                      sigma_lab, z_test_recon_diag$mfpca_raw_ise[ii]),
       xlab = "Log Hill Spacing", ylab = "Density")
  lines(z_grid, z_recon_mfpca, col = "#D95F02", lwd = 2)

  plot(z_grid, z_truth_raw, type = "l", lwd = 2.5, col = "black",
       main = sprintf("GP mean\nISE=%.4f", z_test_recon_diag$gp_mean_ise[ii]),
       xlab = "Log Hill Spacing", ylab = "Density")
  lines(z_grid, z_recon_final, col = "steelblue", lwd = 2)
}
mtext("Z Diagnostic: raw KDE, MFPCA reconstruction, and GP reconstruction",
      outer = TRUE, cex = 1.1, font = 2)
```

```{r paper_fig2, fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
# ==============================================================================
# PAPER FIGURE 2
# Grey: raw sign-corrected scores
# Annotated with lag-1 ACF of smoothed series and residual SD s_k per panel.
# ==============================================================================

sigma_ord_fig2  <- order(ufpca_scores_raw_aligned$theta)
sig_s_fig2      <- ufpca_scores_raw_aligned$theta[sigma_ord_fig2]

par(mfrow = c(2, 4), mar = c(4, 3.5, 2.8, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 3, 0))

for (pc in 1:8) {
  pc_col    <- paste0("PC", pc)
  raw_s     <- ufpca_scores_raw_aligned[sigma_ord_fig2, pc_col]
  smooth_s  <- ufpca_scores_smoothed[sigma_ord_fig2, pc_col]
  s_k_val   <- round(sd(raw_s - smooth_s), 3)
  acf_val   <- round(cor(smooth_s[-length(smooth_s)], smooth_s[-1]), 2)

  plot(sig_s_fig2, raw_s, type = "l", col = "gray75", lwd = 1,
       main = bquote(PC[.(pc)] ~~ italic(s)[k] == .(s_k_val)),
       xlab = expression(sigma), ylab = "PC Score", cex.main = 0.9)
  lines(sig_s_fig2, smooth_s, col = "steelblue", lwd = 2.5)
  abline(h = 0, col = "gray40", lty = 2, lwd = 0.8)
  mtext(paste0("acf=", acf_val), side = 3, line = -1.3, adj = 0.97,
        cex = 0.62, col = "steelblue3")
  if (pc == 1)
    legend("topright", c("Raw", "Fixed LOESS"),
           col = c("gray75", "steelblue"), lwd = c(1, 2.5),
           cex = 0.64, bty = "n")
}
mtext(expression("MFPCA PC Scores vs " ~ theta ~ " (PCs 1"),
      outer = TRUE, cex = 1.2, font = 2)
```

```{r paper_fig3, fig.width=11, fig.height=13}
# ==============================================================================
# PAPER FIGURE 3
# Layout: 4 rows (low/mid-low/mid-high/high
# Black: held-out KDE.  Dark orange dot-dash: MFPCA reconstruction.  Purple dashed: naive baseline.  Blue: GP mean.
# Shaded: 95% pointwise credible band.  Coverage % annotated per panel.
# ==============================================================================

idx4      <- round(seq(1, n_test_s, length.out = 4))
col_truth <- "gray20"
col_mfpca <- "#D95F02"
col_naive <- "#7B6D8D"
col_gp    <- "steelblue"
col_band  <- rgb(0.27, 0.51, 0.71, 0.22)

par(mfrow = c(4, 3), mar = c(3.5, 4, 2.5, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 3, 0))

for (ii in seq_along(idx4)) {
  i         <- idx4[ii]
  sigma_val <- round(test_theta_vals[i], 2)
  ref_row   <- test_theta_idx[i]
  pe        <- post_ens[[i]]

  panels <- list(
    list(grid  = x_grid,
         truth = dens_mat_x[ref_row, ], mfpca = recon_dens_x_true[ref_row, ], naive = mean_train_dens_x,
         gp_m  = pe$mean_x, lo = pe$lower_x, hi = pe$upper_x,
         cov_i = cov_x[i],  xl = "Log Period Ratio"),
    list(grid  = y_grid,
         truth = dens_mat_y[ref_row, ], mfpca = recon_dens_y_true[ref_row, ], naive = mean_train_dens_y,
         gp_m  = pe$mean_y, lo = pe$lower_y, hi = pe$upper_y,
         cov_i = cov_y[i],  xl = "Log Duration Ratio"),
    list(grid  = z_grid,
         truth = dens_mat_z[ref_row, ], mfpca = recon_dens_z_true[ref_row, ], naive = mean_train_dens_z,
         gp_m  = pe$mean_z, lo = pe$lower_z, hi = pe$upper_z,
         cov_i = cov_z[i],  xl = "Log Hill Spacing")
  )

  for (p in panels) {
    yr <- range(c(p$truth, p$hi, p$mfpca, p$naive, p$gp_m), na.rm = TRUE)
    yr[1] <- max(0, yr[1])

    plot(p$grid, p$truth, type = "l", col = col_truth, lwd = 2.5,
         xlab = p$xl, ylab = "Density", ylim = yr,
         main = sprintf("\u03c3 = %.2f  [cov: %.0f%%]", sigma_val, p$cov_i * 100),
         cex.main = 0.87)
    polygon(c(p$grid, rev(p$grid)), c(p$lo, rev(p$hi)),
            col = col_band, border = NA)
    lines(p$grid, p$mfpca,  col = col_mfpca, lwd = 1.8, lty = 3)
    lines(p$grid, p$naive,  col = col_naive, lwd = 1.8, lty = 2)
    lines(p$grid, p$gp_m,   col = col_gp,    lwd = 1.8)

    if (ii == 1 && p$xl == "Log Period Ratio")
      legend("topright",
             c("KDE truth", "MFPCA recon", "Naive", "GP mean", "95% band"),
             col  = c(col_truth, col_mfpca, col_naive, col_gp, col_band),
             lwd  = c(2.5, 1.8, 1.8, 1.8, 8),
             lty  = c(1, 3, 2, 1, 1),
             cex  = 0.62, bty = "n")
  }
}
mtext(expression("Posterior Predictive Densities at 4 Held-Out " * theta * " Values"),
      outer = TRUE, cex = 1.2, font = 2)
```



```{r significance_tests}
# ==============================================================================
# SIGNIFICANCE TESTS
# H1 (one-sided): GP iCRPS < Naive iCRPS  (GP wins if p < 0.05)
# Bootstrap 95% CI on ratio GP/Naive for iCRPS.
# ==============================================================================

cat("\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 64), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat("PAIRED WILCOXON SIGNED-RANK TESTS  (n=25 test pairs, one-sided)\n")
cat("H1: GP lower than comparator  [* p<0.05   . p<0.10   blank: ns]\n")
cat(paste(rep("=", 64), collapse = ""), "\n")
cat(sprintf("%-44s  %8s  %6s\n", "Comparison", "p-value", "V stat"))
cat(paste(rep("-", 62), collapse = ""), "\n")

test_pairs_wx <- list(
  list(gp = icrps_gp_x, cp = icrps_naive_x, nm = "iCRPS X:     GP vs Naive"),
  list(gp = icrps_gp_y, cp = icrps_naive_y, nm = "iCRPS Y:     GP vs Naive"),
  list(gp = icrps_gp_z, cp = icrps_naive_z, nm = "iCRPS Z:     GP vs Naive")
)

for (tp in test_pairs_wx) {
  wt  <- wilcox.test(tp$gp, tp$cp, paired = TRUE, alternative = "less",
                     exact = FALSE)
  sig <- if (wt$p.value < 0.05) "*" else if (wt$p.value < 0.10) "." else " "
  cat(sprintf("%-44s  %8.4f  %6.0f %s\n",
              tp$nm, wt$p.value, wt$statistic, sig))
}
cat(paste(rep("=", 64), collapse = ""), "\n\n")

# --- Bootstrap 95% CIs on ratio GP/Naive (B=5000) ---
set.seed(42)
B_boot <- 5000

boot_ci <- function(x, y, B) {
  ratios <- replicate(B, {
    idx <- sample(length(x), replace = TRUE)
    mean(x[idx]) / mean(y[idx])
  })
  quantile(ratios, c(0.025, 0.975))
}

cat("Bootstrap 95% CIs on GP/Naive ratio  (< 1.0 = GP wins)\n")
cat(paste(rep("-", 56), collapse = ""), "\n")

for (info in list(
  list(gp = icrps_gp_x,  mp = icrps_naive_x,  nm = "iCRPS(X)       ratio GP/Naive"),
  list(gp = icrps_gp_y,  mp = icrps_naive_y,  nm = "iCRPS(Y)       ratio GP/Naive"),
  list(gp = icrps_gp_z,  mp = icrps_naive_z,  nm = "iCRPS(Z)       ratio GP/Naive")
)) {
  obs   <- mean(info$gp) / mean(info$mp)
  ci    <- boot_ci(info$gp, info$mp, B_boot)
  below <- if (ci[2] < 1.0) "YES (CI entirely < 1)" else
           if (ci[1] < 1.0) "partial"                else "NO"
  cat(sprintf("%-33s  obs=%.3f  CI=[%.3f, %.3f]  GP wins: %s\n",
              info$nm, obs, ci[1], ci[2], below))
}
cat(paste(rep("=", 64), collapse = ""), "\n\n")
```





```{r fig_reconstruction}
# ==============================================================================
# FIGURE: THREE-STAGE RECONSTRUCTION COMPARISON
# Rows: X, Y, Z.  Columns: KDE target, MFPCA reconstruction, GP reconstruction
# ==============================================================================

# Select representative test point: median iCRPS for Y
median_idx <- which.min(abs(icrps_gp_y - median(icrps_gp_y)))
theta_star <- test_theta_vals[median_idx]
cat(sprintf("Representative theta* = %.1f g cm^-2 (median iCRPS(Y) test point, index %d)\n",
            theta_star, median_idx))

ref_row <- test_theta_idx[median_idx]

# Build panel data
fig_recon_data <- list()
annotations <- list()

for (v in c("X", "Y", "Z")) {
  grid_v <- switch(v, X = x_grid, Y = y_grid, Z = z_grid)
  kde_v  <- switch(v,
    X = dens_mat_x[ref_row, ],
    Y = dens_mat_y[ref_row, ],
    Z = dens_mat_z[ref_row, ])

  # MFPCA reconstruction from true scores
  # ufpca_scores_long rows align with theta_list; extract PC columns as numeric vector
  true_scores <- as.numeric(ufpca_scores_long[ref_row, paste0("PC", seq_len(M_components))])
  recon_true_all <- reconstruct_densities(matrix(true_scores, nrow = 1L), mu_x, mu_y, mu_z,
                                          phi_x, phi_y, phi_z, x_grid, y_grid, z_grid,
                                          x_peak_loc = peak_loc_x_all[ref_row],
                                          x_peak_width = peak_width_x_all[ref_row],
                                          x_peak_left_width = peak_left_width_x_all[ref_row],
                                          x_peak_right_width = peak_right_width_x_all[ref_row],
                                          z_peak_loc = peak_loc_z_all[ref_row],
                                          z_peak_width = peak_width_z_all[ref_row],
                                          z_peak_left_width = peak_left_width_z_all[ref_row],
                                          z_peak_right_width = peak_right_width_z_all[ref_row])
  mfpca_recon <- switch(v, X = as.vector(recon_true_all$x),
                           Y = as.vector(recon_true_all$y),
                           Z = as.vector(recon_true_all$z))
  recon_ise   <- compute_ISE(mfpca_recon, kde_v, grid_v)

  # GP reconstruction: posterior mean
  gp_mu_scores <- as.numeric(final_pred_test_df[median_idx, paste0("PC", seq_len(M_components))])
  gp_mean_all <- reconstruct_densities(matrix(gp_mu_scores, nrow = 1L), mu_x, mu_y, mu_z,
                                       phi_x, phi_y, phi_z, x_grid, y_grid, z_grid,
                                       x_peak_loc = pred_peak_x_test[median_idx],
                                       x_peak_width = pred_width_x_test[median_idx],
                                       x_peak_left_width = pred_left_width_x_test[median_idx],
                                       x_peak_right_width = pred_right_width_x_test[median_idx],
                                       z_peak_loc = pred_peak_z_test[median_idx],
                                       z_peak_width = pred_width_z_test[median_idx],
                                       z_peak_left_width = pred_left_width_z_test[median_idx],
                                       z_peak_right_width = pred_right_width_z_test[median_idx])
  gp_mean_dens <- switch(v, X = as.vector(gp_mean_all$x),
                            Y = as.vector(gp_mean_all$y),
                            Z = as.vector(gp_mean_all$z))

  # GP ensemble for credible band, using Option A residual-GP posterior variance.
  gp_sd <- sqrt(pmax(pred_test_var_mat[median_idx, ], 1e-10))
  set.seed(999 + which(c("X","Y","Z") == v))
  gp_samp <- matrix(
    rnorm(N_SAMP * M_components,
          mean = rep(gp_mu_scores, each = N_SAMP),
          sd   = rep(gp_sd, each = N_SAMP)),
    nrow = N_SAMP, ncol = M_components)
  ens_v <- reconstruct_densities(gp_samp, mu_x, mu_y, mu_z,
                                  phi_x, phi_y, phi_z, x_grid, y_grid, z_grid,
                                  x_peak_loc = rep(pred_peak_x_test[median_idx], N_SAMP),
                                  x_peak_width = rep(pred_width_x_test[median_idx], N_SAMP),
                                  x_peak_left_width = rep(pred_left_width_x_test[median_idx], N_SAMP),
                                  x_peak_right_width = rep(pred_right_width_x_test[median_idx], N_SAMP),
                                  z_peak_loc = rep(pred_peak_z_test[median_idx], N_SAMP),
                                  z_peak_width = rep(pred_width_z_test[median_idx], N_SAMP),
                                  z_peak_left_width = rep(pred_left_width_z_test[median_idx], N_SAMP),
                                  z_peak_right_width = rep(pred_right_width_z_test[median_idx], N_SAMP))
  ens_mat <- switch(v, X = ens_v$x, Y = ens_v$y, Z = ens_v$z)
  band_lo <- apply(ens_mat, 2, quantile, 0.025)
  band_hi <- apply(ens_mat, 2, quantile, 0.975)
  coverage <- mean(kde_v >= band_lo & kde_v <= band_hi)
  icrps_v  <- switch(v,
    X = icrps_gp_x[median_idx],
    Y = icrps_gp_y[median_idx],
    Z = icrps_gp_z[median_idx])

  dt <- diff(grid_v[1:2])

  # Store annotations
  annotations[[v]] <- list(ise = recon_ise, icrps = icrps_v, coverage = coverage)

  # Panel data
  fig_recon_data[[length(fig_recon_data) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    t = grid_v, density = kde_v, stage = "KDE (target)",
    variable = v, line_type = "KDE", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  fig_recon_data[[length(fig_recon_data) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    t = grid_v, density = mfpca_recon, stage = "MFPCA reconstruction",
    variable = v, line_type = "MFPCA", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  # KDE reference in MFPCA panel
  fig_recon_data[[length(fig_recon_data) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    t = grid_v, density = kde_v, stage = "MFPCA reconstruction",
    variable = v, line_type = "KDE ref", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  fig_recon_data[[length(fig_recon_data) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    t = grid_v, density = gp_mean_dens, stage = "GP reconstruction",
    variable = v, line_type = "GP mean", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  # KDE reference in GP panel
  fig_recon_data[[length(fig_recon_data) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    t = grid_v, density = kde_v, stage = "GP reconstruction",
    variable = v, line_type = "KDE ref", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  # Credible band
  fig_recon_data[[length(fig_recon_data) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    t = grid_v, density = band_lo, stage = "GP reconstruction",
    variable = v, line_type = "band_lo", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  fig_recon_data[[length(fig_recon_data) + 1]] <- data.frame(
    t = grid_v, density = band_hi, stage = "GP reconstruction",
    variable = v, line_type = "band_hi", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

df_plot <- do.call(rbind, fig_recon_data)
df_plot$stage <- factor(df_plot$stage,
  levels = c("KDE (target)", "MFPCA reconstruction", "GP reconstruction"))
df_plot$variable <- factor(df_plot$variable, levels = c("X", "Y", "Z"))

# Separate band data
df_lines <- df_plot[!df_plot$line_type %in% c("band_lo", "band_hi"), ]
df_band_lo <- df_plot[df_plot$line_type == "band_lo", ]
df_band_hi <- df_plot[df_plot$line_type == "band_hi", ]
df_band <- merge(df_band_lo[, c("t", "density", "stage", "variable")],
                  df_band_hi[, c("t", "density", "stage", "variable")],
                  by = c("t", "stage", "variable"), suffixes = c("_lo", "_hi"))

# Build annotation labels
ann_df <- data.frame(
  stage = factor(c(rep("MFPCA reconstruction", 3), rep("GP reconstruction", 3)),
                  levels = levels(df_plot$stage)),
  variable = factor(rep(c("X", "Y", "Z"), 2), levels = c("X", "Y", "Z")),
  label = c(
    sprintf("ISE = %.3f", annotations$X$ise),
    sprintf("ISE = %.3f", annotations$Y$ise),
    sprintf("ISE = %.3f", annotations$Z$ise),
    sprintf("iCRPS = %.3f\nCov = %.1f%%", annotations$X$icrps, 100*annotations$X$coverage),
    sprintf("iCRPS = %.3f\nCov = %.1f%%", annotations$Y$icrps, 100*annotations$Y$coverage),
    sprintf("iCRPS = %.3f\nCov = %.1f%%", annotations$Z$icrps, 100*annotations$Z$coverage)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

library(ggplot2)
p_recon <- ggplot() +
  geom_ribbon(data = df_band,
    aes(x = t, ymin = density_lo, ymax = density_hi),
    fill = "#c6dbef", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(data = df_lines[df_lines$line_type == "KDE ref", ],
    aes(x = t, y = density), colour = "black", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_line(data = df_lines[df_lines$line_type == "KDE", ],
    aes(x = t, y = density), colour = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_line(data = df_lines[df_lines$line_type == "MFPCA", ],
    aes(x = t, y = density), colour = "#D95F02", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_line(data = df_lines[df_lines$line_type == "GP mean", ],
    aes(x = t, y = density), colour = "#2166ac", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_label(data = ann_df, aes(label = label),
    x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.05, vjust = 1.1, size = 2.5,
    label.size = 0, fill = "white", alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_grid(variable ~ stage, scales = "free") +
  labs(x = "t", y = "Density",
       title = bquote("Three-stage reconstruction at " * theta * " = " *
                       .(round(theta_star, 1)) ~ "g" ~ cm^{-2})) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 9))

ggsave("fig_reconstruction.pdf", p_recon, width = 10, height = 8)
cat("Saved fig_reconstruction.pdf\n")
```


```{r fig_scores, fig.width=16, fig.height=7, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# =============================================================================
# FIGURE: MFPCA Score Series
#   Main figure (fig_scores.pdf): PCs 1-8
#
#   Grey dots  = raw theta-level scores       xi_k(theta)
#   Blue line  = LOESS-smoothed diagnostics   xi~_k(theta)
#   Annotation = lag-1 autocorrelation of smooth (r1) + residual SD (sk)
# =============================================================================
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)

pc_cols_plot <- paste0("PC", 1:M_components)

# Raw theta-level scores on the training subset
train_scores_raw_series <- as.matrix(ufpca_scores_raw_aligned[train_theta_idx, pc_cols_plot, drop = FALSE])

# Build one panel per PC (all 8; 2x4 main figure)
make_score_panel <- function(k, base_size = 10) {
  raw_k  <- train_scores_raw_series[, k]
  smth_k <- ufpca_scores_smoothed[train_theta_idx, pc_cols_plot[k]]
  sig    <- train_theta_vals
  lag1   <- cor(smth_k[-length(smth_k)], smth_k[-1L])
  sk     <- pc_local_resid_sd_mean[k]
  df_k   <- data.frame(theta = sig, raw = raw_k, smooth = smth_k)

  ggplot(df_k, aes(x = theta)) +
    geom_point(aes(y = raw),    colour = "grey60", size = 1.0, alpha = 0.70) +
    geom_line (aes(y = smooth), colour = "#2166ac", linewidth = 1.0) +
    annotate("label",
             x     = min(sig) + 0.03 * diff(range(sig)),
             y     = max(raw_k, na.rm = TRUE),
             label = sprintf("r1 = %.3f\nmean local sk = %.3f", lag1, sk),
             hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 3.0,
             fill = "white", label.size = 0.2,
             label.padding = unit(0.18, "lines")) +
    labs(x = expression(theta~~(g~cm^-2)),
         y = paste0("PC", k, " score")) +
    theme_bw(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          plot.margin = margin(5, 8, 5, 5))
}

panels <- lapply(1:8, make_score_panel)

# --- Main figure: PCs 1-8 (2x4) ------------------------------------------
fig_scores_path <- "C:/Users/SOS/Desktop/cowork/fig_scores.pdf"
pdf(fig_scores_path, width = 16, height = 7)
do.call(grid.arrange, c(panels[1:8], list(nrow = 2, ncol = 4,
  top = "MFPCA score series: raw (grey) and LOESS-smoothed (blue), PCs 1-8")))
invisible(dev.off())
cat("Saved:", fig_scores_path, "\n")
```

```{r fig_ppd, fig.width=11, fig.height=7, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# =============================================================================
# FIGURE: Posterior Predictive Densities at 4 held-out theta values
#   3 rows (X, Y, Z) x 4 columns (selected theta values)
#   Black solid  = held-out KDE
#   Red dashed   = naive training-mean baseline
#   Blue solid   = GP posterior mean
#   Blue shaded  = 95% residual-GP credible band
#   Annotation   = empirical density-space coverage
# =============================================================================
N_SAMP_FIG <- 500L

# Select 4 test theta values spread across the test range
test_order    <- order(test_theta_vals)
sel_positions <- c(3L, 9L, 17L, 22L)           # ~12%, 36%, 68%, 88% of test range
sel_idx       <- test_order[sel_positions]      # indices into 1:n_test_s

panel_data <- list()

for (j in seq_along(sel_idx)) {
  i <- sel_idx[j]

  # --- GP mean and variance (already computed for all held-out theta values) ---
  gp_mu  <- as.numeric(final_pred_test_df[i, paste0("PC", seq_len(M_components))])
  gp_var <- pmax(pred_test_var_mat[i, ], 1e-10)
  gp_sd  <- sqrt(gp_var)

  # --- Draw posterior samples ---
  samp_scores <- matrix(
    rnorm(N_SAMP_FIG * M_components,
          mean = rep(gp_mu, each = N_SAMP_FIG),
          sd   = rep(gp_sd, each = N_SAMP_FIG)),
    nrow = N_SAMP_FIG, ncol = M_components)

  # --- Reconstruct density ensemble ---
  ens <- reconstruct_densities(samp_scores, mu_x, mu_y, mu_z,
                               phi_x, phi_y, phi_z, x_grid, y_grid, z_grid,
                               x_peak_loc = rep(pred_peak_x_test[i], N_SAMP_FIG),
                               x_peak_width = rep(pred_width_x_test[i], N_SAMP_FIG),
                               x_peak_left_width = rep(pred_left_width_x_test[i], N_SAMP_FIG),
                               x_peak_right_width = rep(pred_right_width_x_test[i], N_SAMP_FIG),
                               z_peak_loc = rep(pred_peak_z_test[i], N_SAMP_FIG),
                               z_peak_width = rep(pred_width_z_test[i], N_SAMP_FIG),
                               z_peak_left_width = rep(pred_left_width_z_test[i], N_SAMP_FIG),
                               z_peak_right_width = rep(pred_right_width_z_test[i], N_SAMP_FIG))

  # --- GP posterior mean density (single sample at gp_mu) ---
  mean_mat <- matrix(gp_mu, nrow = 1L)
  ens_mean <- reconstruct_densities(mean_mat, mu_x, mu_y, mu_z,
                                    phi_x, phi_y, phi_z, x_grid, y_grid, z_grid,
                                    x_peak_loc = pred_peak_x_test[i],
                                    x_peak_width = pred_width_x_test[i],
                                    x_peak_left_width = pred_left_width_x_test[i],
                                    x_peak_right_width = pred_right_width_x_test[i],
                                    z_peak_loc = pred_peak_z_test[i],
                                    z_peak_width = pred_width_z_test[i],
                                    z_peak_left_width = pred_left_width_z_test[i],
                                    z_peak_right_width = pred_right_width_z_test[i])

  # --- True KDE at this held-out theta ---
  ref_row <- test_theta_idx[i]
  true_x  <- dens_mat_x[ref_row, ]
  true_y  <- dens_mat_y[ref_row, ]
  true_z  <- dens_mat_z[ref_row, ]

  theta_lbl <- paste0("theta==", round(test_theta_vals[i], 1L), "~g~cm^-2")  # plotmath for label_parsed

  for (vn in c("x", "y", "z")) {
    grid_v  <- switch(vn, x = x_grid,           y = y_grid,           z = z_grid)
    true_v  <- switch(vn, x = true_x,           y = true_y,           z = true_z)
    naive_v <- switch(vn, x = mean_train_dens_x, y = mean_train_dens_y, z = mean_train_dens_z)
    samp_v  <- switch(vn, x = ens$x,            y = ens$y,            z = ens$z)
    mean_v  <- switch(vn, x = as.numeric(ens_mean$x),
                           y = as.numeric(ens_mean$y),
                           z = as.numeric(ens_mean$z))

    q_lo <- apply(samp_v, 2L, quantile, 0.025)
    q_hi <- apply(samp_v, 2L, quantile, 0.975)
    cov  <- mean(true_v >= q_lo & true_v <= q_hi) * 100

    panel_data[[length(panel_data) + 1L]] <- data.frame(
      grid      = grid_v,
      true_dens = true_v,
      naive     = naive_v,
      gp_mean   = mean_v,
      q_lo      = q_lo,
      q_hi      = q_hi,
      variable  = switch(vn,
                    x = "X: log period ratio",
                    y = "Y: log duration ratio",
                    z = "Z: log Hill spacing"),
      theta_lbl = theta_lbl,
      coverage  = round(cov, 1L),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
}

all_panels <- do.call(rbind, panel_data)
all_panels$variable  <- factor(all_panels$variable,
  levels = c("X: log period ratio", "Y: log duration ratio", "Z: log Hill spacing"))
all_panels$theta_lbl <- factor(all_panels$theta_lbl, levels = unique(all_panels$theta_lbl))

# Per-panel coverage annotation
annot_df <- unique(all_panels[, c("variable", "theta_lbl", "coverage")])
annot_df$cov_lbl <- sprintf("Cov = %.1f%%", annot_df$coverage)

fig_ppd <- ggplot(all_panels, aes(x = grid)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = q_lo, ymax = q_hi),
              fill = "#4393c3", alpha = 0.28) +
  geom_line(aes(y = naive),     colour = "#d73027",  linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.75) +
  geom_line(aes(y = true_dens), colour = "black",    linewidth = 0.85) +
  geom_line(aes(y = gp_mean),   colour = "#2166ac",  linewidth = 0.85) +
  geom_text(data = annot_df,
            aes(x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = cov_lbl),
            hjust = -0.10, vjust = 1.35, size = 2.5,
            colour = "grey20", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  facet_grid(variable ~ theta_lbl,
             scales = "free",
             labeller = labeller(theta_lbl = label_parsed)) +   # plotmath: renders theta (
  labs(x = "Value",
       y = "Density",
       title = expression("Posterior predictive densities at 4 held-out " * theta * " values"),
       caption = paste("Black: held-out KDE  |  Red dashed: training-mean naive baseline",
                       " |  Blue: GP posterior mean  |  Shaded: 95% residual-GP credible band")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9) +
  theme(strip.text.x     = element_text(size = 8.0, face = "bold"),
        strip.text.y     = element_text(size = 7.5, face = "bold"),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey92", colour = "grey70"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 9, face = "plain"),
        plot.caption     = element_text(size = 6.5, colour = "grey40",
                                        hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(t = 4)))

fig_ppd_path <- "C:/Users/SOS/Desktop/cowork/fig_ppd.pdf"
ggsave(fig_ppd_path, fig_ppd, width = 11, height = 7, device = "pdf")
cat("Saved:", fig_ppd_path, "\n")
```

```{r known_noise_variance_check, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# =============================================================================
# H: Variance diagnostic
#    For each test theta*, compare the learned latent GP uncertainty
#    v_k(theta*) to the residual-GP likelihood nugget floor.
# =============================================================================
cat("=== H: Variance diagnostic ===\n")
cat("Residual-GP posterior variance relative to the nugget floor across K=30 components\n\n")

var_share <- pred_test_latent_var_mat / pmax(pred_test_var_mat, 1e-10)
var_ratio <- pred_test_latent_var_mat / pmax(pred_test_obs_var_mat, 1e-10)

cat(sprintf("Mean posterior variance share : % .3f\n", mean(var_share)))
cat(sprintf("Median share                  : % .3f\n", median(var_share)))
cat(sprintf("Share range                   : [%.3f, %.3f]\n", min(var_share), max(var_share)))
cat(sprintf("Mean v/obs_noise_floor        : % .3f\n", mean(var_ratio)))
cat(sprintf("Median v/obs_noise_floor      : % .3f\n", median(var_ratio)))
```
